lines.text: I would love it. Consider it forgotten... But just so you know... however and whenever you decide to propose, I promise I'll say yes. Whether... whether, you know, it is in a basketball game, or in sky writing, or you know, like some lame guy in a cheesy movie who hides it in the cake.

lines.text: No! It's my fault. I keep trying to propose in these stupid ways and all I wanna do is tell you that I love you and I want to spend the rest of my life with you.

lines.text: Phoebe, I love you. There's no-one else in the world I would ask to marry me... three times. But I wanna take care of you, have babies with you, and grow old with you... Phoebe Buffay, will you marry me?

lines.text: Yes!

lines.text: Hello? Yeah, this is Joey Tribbiani... Oh, hi! Well, I'm glad you liked my letter... No my mommy and daddy aren't home right now... Okay, bye bye. She was nice!

lines.text: Whoo-hoo!

lines.text: You're kicking me out?

lines.text: I can't believe I ever even tried to help you. You are so beyond help.

lines.text: You know what? Ever since I got here, you have been nothing but negative.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Excuse me?

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: You didn't want me to marry the old guy with the great apartment. Then, I tried to help your daughter to de-emphasize her flaws And suddenly I am the bad guy?

lines.text: Joey, where are those bags?

lines.text: She has a lot of crap!

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: You know what? When I moved in here I thought: This is gonna be so great. Just us sisters, back together again like when we were kids, except without that stupid Jill... Oh! Who has gotten fat by the way...

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Seriously?

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: hm-mmm... Mom said she gained like fifteen pounds.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hips or thighs?

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: Ass and face.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh! Oh my God! I thought she was on Atkins.

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: She was. Carbs found her... See, this is what I wanted. Two sisters, talking about real stuff.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, I can give you that.

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: You can?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah. I just, I kept trying to make you a better person, but you're... you're already a pretty perfect version of what you are.

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: Thank you. I've got to admit, Emma does look cute.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Did you just say Emma?

lines.speaker: Amy
lines.text: Ugh, I'm sorry... Ella.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: That woman at the game didn't know what she was talking about. Mike, obviously you have balls.

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: But please, let's just forget the whole thing.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I would love it. Consider it forgotten... But just so you know... however and whenever you decide to propose, I promise I'll say yes. Whether... whether, you know, it is in a basketball game, or in sky writing, or you know, like some lame guy in a cheesy movie who hides it in the cake.

scenes.scene_description: Mike and Phoebe at a restaurant.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: It's in the cake, isn't it?

lines.text: Where else would lame Mr. No Balls hide it?
lines.stage_direction: puts on a fake smile he takes the ring from the cake, and cleans it with a napkin

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: What's the matter with me? How do I keep ruining this? I'm sorry, I'm sorry!

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: No! It's my fault. I keep trying to propose in these stupid ways and all I wanna do is tell you that I love you and I want to spend the rest of my life with you.

scenes.scene_description: Mike's face changes from happy to sad, and he looks at the cake, disappointed.

scenes.location: Mike and Phoebe at a restaurant

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: I'm gonna do this now .

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh my God!

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: Phoebe, I...

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Wait! Oh wait! Oh no!
lines.stage_direction: she takes off a ring that was already on her left ring finger. After that Mike starts to kneel again, but then... She was wearing rings on all her fingers and her thumb, and takes all of these off.

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: Ready?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Uh-huh!

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: Phoebe, I love you. There's no-one else in the world I would ask to marry me... three times. But I wanna take care of you, have babies with you, and grow old with you... Phoebe Buffay, will you marry me?

lines.text: Yes!

lines.text: I love you more!

lines.text: Hey, finished my recommendation. Here. And I think you’ll be very, very happy. It’s the longest I ever spent on a computer without looking at porn.

lines.text: Why not?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Well, because you signed it baby kangaroo Tribbiani . Hey, why don’t you stop worrying about sounding smart and just be yourself!

lines.text: You know what? You don’t need a thesaurus, just write from here, your full sized aortic pump.

lines.text: Oh, come on! Last night I was finishing off a pizza and she said "Uoh oh oh, a moment on the lips, forever on the hips!" I don’t need that kind of talk in my house!

lines.text: Well Joey, uhm look, I know that she’s difficult, but I think it’s really good that she’s here.

lines.text: No, it's just... look, you know, when I first moved to the city I was a lot like her! I was spoiled, self-centered and you guys really took care of me.

lines.text: Well, uhm... whatever, I have really appreciated it, 'cause I don’t think I would be the person that I am today if it wasn’t for you guys. See, I wanna help Amy the way you guys helped me. And I know it’s gonna take patience, but that’s ok.

lines.text: Good morning.

lines.text: Yeaah.

lines.text: Who's Gladys?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh, she's that work of art I made, you know, with the woman coming out of the frame.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh, I didn't know you wanted her too!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Huh!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well, I mean, sure, of course. But... you already gave that to Monica, so...

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: You know, I would give her up, for you.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: No, I couldn't let you do that.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: But I want to.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: But I don't want you to.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: But I insist!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: But I insist harder !

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Girls, girls, stop, ok? We'll flip a coin. Heads, she's Rachel's, tails she's Monica's. . Tails! Monica, she's yours!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: No, that landed in your food!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: No, no, that's ok. You won fair and square. I'm so sad!

scenes.scene_description: Monica's apartment. Phoebe enters the room.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey Joe!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: What's up?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Bad news. I watched the tape and passed it along to my bosses and they weren't interested.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I'm sorry man.
lines.stage_direction: Hands the tape back to him

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: But, ehm... you watched the tape?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah! I... I... I liked it! But, ehm... my bosses didn't go for it. Stupid sons of bitches !
lines.stage_direction: sounds nervous Joey continues to look at him suspiciously

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: You didn't watch the tape.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: What!? Of course I did!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Look, it's one thing not to cast me, but to lie to me?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I'm not lying to you, I watched it!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Well, you lied again!
lines.stage_direction: Rachel comes out of her room and is observing the conversation

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I watched it!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Keep going Pinocchio!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I did!
lines.stage_direction: now yelling pretending to look shocked

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No you didn't!
lines.stage_direction: yelling back turns and goes towards his room

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I'm telling you, I watched the tape.

scenes.scene_description: Chandler walks into Joey's apartment

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Did you watch the tape?

scenes.scene_description: Reaches Joey's room and Joey slams the door in his face

scenes.location: Interview room. Ross and two other professors (one man

lines.speaker: Benjamin
lines.text: The selection committee has chosen the three of you as our finalists today. The ultimate decision will be based upon the answers you give to the questions I ask here. I'm gonna start with Dr. Li. Dr. Li, you claim the field is too reliant on the Linnaean taxonomic system. How do you propose to correct this problem?

lines.speaker: Dr. Li
lines.text: Well, I believe that the answers lie in the osteological evidence. I plan to begin there.

lines.speaker: Benjamin
lines.text: Interesting.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I guess!

lines.speaker: Benjamin
lines.text: Dr. Biely, your proposal includes some field work. Where might that take place?

lines.speaker: Dr. Biely
lines.text: Primarily in the Pierre Shale region of South Dakota.

lines.speaker: Benjamin
lines.text: Certainly. Very well. And Dr. Geller, when is my birthday?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What? I... I...
lines.stage_direction: shocked and confused by the question

scenes.scene_description: Interview room. Ross and two other professors (one man, one woman) are sitting on one side of a long desk. Benjamin Hobart is sitting on the other side

scenes.location: Interview room. Ross and two other professors (one man

lines.speaker: Benjamin
lines.text: Care to venture a guess?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: May 12th?

lines.speaker: Benjamin
lines.text: That's not even kinda close! Dr. Li, how many graduate students you'd be needing?
lines.stage_direction: looks surprised and un-impressed Ross looks around confused

lines.speaker: Dr. Li
lines.text: Half a dozen.

lines.speaker: Benjamin
lines.text: I see, and Dr. Biely?

lines.speaker: Dr. Biely
lines.text: Three for excavation and two for analysis.

lines.speaker: Benjamin
lines.text: Certainly. Dr. Geller, which 1965 Shirelles hit was later covered by a popular British invasion band?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Wha..? I need 6 graduate students.

lines.speaker: Benjamin
lines.text: No! I'm sorry, we were looking for "Baby It's You". Baby It's You.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Wha...? Wait, wait, wait, just a minute. None of my questions have anything to do with Paleontology.

lines.speaker: Benjamin
lines.text: You're right, I apologize. Scratch the last question. Spell "Boscodictiasaur".

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: um... I've never heard of a "Boscodictiasaur".

lines.speaker: Benjamin
lines.text: Yeah, I just made it up. Spell it.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Ok. B - O - S ...
lines.stage_direction: stares at him angrily determined to spell it correctly

lines.speaker: Benjamin
lines.text: No, it starts with a silent "M".

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh come on!!

scenes.scene_description: Benjamin looks at him as if to say "What's wrong? Answer the question"

scenes.location: Joey and Rachel's apartment. Chandler and Rachel are talking

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I can't believe Joey. I hate being called a liar!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: But you are a liar.

lines.text: What did I just say?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: You still here?

lines.text: Yes, and I have to say, I am not just hurt. I am insulted. When I tell somebody I did something...

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Ok whoah-hey... Let me just stop you right there, ok? First, you lied, right? Then , you lied about lying, ok? Then you lied about lying about lying, ok? So before you lie about lying about lying about lying about... lying... Stop lying!
lines.stage_direction: loses count and begins to count the number of 'lyings' in the air but gives up. yelling

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Why are you so sure I didn't watch this tape?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: You wanna know wh...? You wanna know why?

scenes.scene_description: Joey comes out of his room

lines.text: Well, this is going well.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Here's how I know you didn't watch the tape, ok? If you had seen what was on this tape, believe me, you would have some comments. Alright, now remember, I got paid a lot of money for this and it only aired in Japan.
lines.stage_direction: comes out holding the tape puts it into the vcr presses play and he appears on the TV screen and a TV commercial begins

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: And that's how I know you didn't watch the tape! .

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: He really is a chameleon.

scenes.location: Monica's apartment. Phoebe enters carrying the horrific 'painting' of Gladys. Monica and Rachel are sitting on the couch

lines.text: Well, Gladys say hello to your new home!
lines.stage_direction: smiling from ear to ear she holds out the 'painting'

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh, my!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Are you still here?

lines.text: Hey, you got one right!

Joey and Rachel's apartment.

lines.text: SHE'S YOURS!

lines.text: She's yours!

lines.text: Hey!

lines.text: She's m-i-i-ne!

lines.text: I want Gladys!

lines.text: She's mine!

lines.text: Look, I'm sorry I didn't give them your tape. And I promise, next time to submit you whether I think you are right for the part or not.

lines.text: Oh my God!

scenes.location: Central Perk. Some time later that day. The group has left and Charlie is there when Ross enters

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Your ex-boyfriend is insane.

lines.speaker: Charlie
lines.text: Did you get the grant?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No I didn't, and you want to know why? Because your ex-boyfriend is still in love with you.

lines.speaker: Charlie
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah. He wouldn't give me the grant, because I wouldn't give you up.

lines.speaker: Charlie
lines.text: Benji isn't in love with me. I mean, he broke up with me . And besides, he's a very ethical man.

lines.speaker: Ross

lines.speaker: Charlie
lines.text: I'm sure he was just joking, Ross.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: If you don't believe me, let's go talk to him, okay? I'm telling you, he didn't ask me one paleontological question.

lines.text: Seriously?

lines.text: Damnit!

lines.text: Dr. Geller...? Charlie... What are you... what are you doing here?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I want you to tell her everything. About the deal you tried to make with me, about the crazy questions you... Wally Cox! That's the voice of Underdog!

lines.text: No!

lines.speaker: Charlie
lines.text: Yes!

lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: or...

lines.speaker: Charlie
lines.text: Maybe...

lines.text: Sweetie, this conversation is starting to make me a little uncomfortable.

lines.speaker: Charlie
lines.text: Oh God! I am so sorry, but... I mean it's... there's so much history between us, you know...

lines.speaker: Benjamin
lines.text: I'm sorry too...
lines.stage_direction: puts his hand on Ross's other cheek

scenes.scene_description: Benjamin's office. Ross and Charlie are entering.

lines.speaker: Benjamin
lines.text: I love you!

lines.speaker: Charlie
lines.text: I love you too!

lines.text: Gladys?

scenes.scene_description: She closes his door again, and turns around. Then she starts screaming, terrified. There is Glynnis... And Monica holding her up, laughing.

title: Friends - 10.07 The One With The Home Study

lines.speaker: Produced by
lines.text: Robert Carlock and Wendy Knoller

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey you guys! Phoebe : Hey!

lines.text: Hey, what are you doing?

lines.text: Oh, figuring out our wedding plans.

lines.text: That's funny, we were doing the same thing!

lines.text: Yeah!

lines.text: So what did you two do about it?

lines.text: It was pretty simple actually, I came up with a couple of cost-cutting solutions, wrote out a list and Monica told me to go to hell.

lines.text: There's no way around it Pheebs, you just gonna have to accept the fact that this is gonna cost you a lot of money.

lines.text: But really, it does seem like this money could be put to better use?

lines.text: Are you serious?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah! Now, how would you feel if we gave all the wedding money to charity and we just got married at City Hall?

lines.text: I think it would make me wanna marry you even more.

lines.text: I've got to say you guys, that's an incredible gesture!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Maybe you do that next time you get married!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No, no, no. The next time it's gonna be a Hawaii at sunset. [pause] But maybe the time after that!

lines.text: Seriously?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yes, I was 4 years old and I was on the swing and then all of a sudden my hair got tangled in the chain. And to get me out my mom had to-had to cut a big chunk of my hair! And it was uneven for weeks!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: And you made it through that? I wonder who's gonna play you in the movie!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ok, fine! You can make fun of me. I do not want Emma going there. And I was thinking Claire Danes.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Look, I'm sorry to hear about your tragedy, ok? But the swings are perfectly safe, and besides Emma loves them. You know what, you should come with us and you'll see!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ross, those things go like 40 miles an hour! Ok? When you're... and there is that moment when you are at the top, when you just don't know if you're gonna return back to earth!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Space is filled with orbiting children. Look, please, just come on, you know, when you’ll see the look on Emma’s face, I swear you won’t regret it.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: All right!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Good, you don’t want to be one of those mothers who pass on their irrational fears on their children, do you?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Irrational, huh? All right, well, I’ll remember that the next time you freak out about a spider in your apartment!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh, yeah, that’s the same, I am sure there are thirty different species of poisonous swings!

scenes.scene_description: Joey and Rachel's apartment.

scenes.location: Monica’s apartment. Somebody knocks the door

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh my God, the adoption lady is early!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Ok, ok, here we go.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Ok.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Here we go. Stand up straight. Big smile.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hello, is this the creepy residence?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: We’re waiting for the adoption lady, but, hey, I’m glad you’re here. I was cleaning this morning and I found this . I don’t know if you wanna use it, but…

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Awe, this is so sweet of you! But you know what? I won’t be needing a veil, I actually won’t be wearing a dress at all!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I told you! I am not coming to a naked wedding!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: No, no, no, we’re not having a big reception, we took the money we were gonna spend on a wedding and we donate them to the children charity.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: That’s crazy! . I am sorry. I just can’t imagine giving up my one wedding day like that!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: We, you know, we’re different! We don’t care about having a huge party. This is really nice for you, but, oh, please, I put this on? And, ow, I look , why, well, radiant. All right, well, who cares, I don’t need a pretty veil and a fancy dress.
lines.stage_direction: She picks up the veil she puts it on she looks her reflex image on a toaster pause

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: That’s right. You’re making a commitment and that’s the same, whether you do that at the Plaza or, where are you gonna do it?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: City Hall.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Ow! Oh, that sounds nice! I am just there for jury duty. They really spruce that place up!
lines.stage_direction: Chandler slaps her on her back

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: It’s ok, it’s ok. I made my decision. What I really want is a great big wedding

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yay!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: But you already gave all your money to charity!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Well, I’ll just ask for it back!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I don’t think you can do that!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Why not! This is her wedding day, this is way more important than some stupid kids!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: That’s sweet, honey, but save something for the adoption Lady.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ok, careful.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Ok.

lines.text: Careful, watch her hair. WATCH HER HAIR!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I know but they’re just so beautiful! Oh, my God, I just pulled one out.

lines.text: I promise you she’s safe! No watch how much she loves this.

lines.text: Ok.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ok, careful, ok. Oh, she’s smiling! Oh my God, she does like it!

lines.text: Awe! Oh my God! Looks, she’s a little dare-devil! Oh, let me push, can I push?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ok. Oh God. Get the camera, it’s in the diaper bag.

scenes.location: The New York City Children's fund

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: We’re seriously asking for our money back?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: It’s for our wedding day! Right, now, is this guy gay or straight, because one of us gonna have to start flirting.

lines.speaker: Charity guy
lines.text: Wow! Are you here to make another donation the same day? I don’t think that that’s ever happened before. Phoebe : Gay, go. Mike : Oh my God, I love your shirt!
lines.stage_direction: to Mike to the charity guy

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: The donation we made earlier, we k…, we w…, we want it back.

lines.speaker: Charity guy
lines.text: Excuse me?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah. See, that money was for a big wedding, that we thought we didn’t want, but it turns out we do.

lines.speaker: Charity guy
lines.text: So you’re asking us to refund your donation to the children?

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: Yeah! This feels really good.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I am sorry. I am, but this wedding is just really important to me.

lines.speaker: Charity guy
lines.text: Hey, it’s not my business, besides it’s probably a good thing. We really would have been spoiling the children, all those food, and warm clothing…
lines.stage_direction: he takes their check from a drawer

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hey, that’s not fair! A person’s wedding is important! And especially to me! Ok? I didn’t have a graduation party! And I didn’t go to Prom. And I spent my sweet sixteen being chased round a tire yard by an escaped mental patient who is his own words wanted to “kill me” or whatever. So I deserve a real celebration and I am not gonna let some sweaty little man make me feel badly about it.

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: She could have been talking about either one of us.

scenes.location: Monica’s apartment. Somebody knocks the door

lines.speaker: Laura
lines.text: Hi, I am Laura, I am here for your adoption interview.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hi, I am Monica and this is Chandler. Please come in.

lines.speaker: Laura
lines.text: Thank you!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Would you like something to drink?

lines.speaker: Laura
lines.text: Oh, water would be fine.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Ok. Great. I am so glad that you are here. We’re really excited about getting this process started.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh, because we love kids. Love ‘em to death.Well, not actually to death, that's just a figure of speech - we love kids the appropriate amount... as allowed by law.

lines.speaker: Laura
lines.text: Your place is just lovely.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Ah, thank you. This building does have a wholesome family feel to it.

lines.speaker: Laura
lines.text: You know, I... I feel like I've been here before. Are any other couples in the building adopting?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Is that that couple on the first floor? Because we should get a baby before them. Yeah! That guy tried to sell me drugs.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: But other than that... wholesome, wholesome building.

lines.speaker: Laura
lines.text: Oh...

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Laura
lines.text: I just realized why I remember this place.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Really? What is it?

lines.speaker: Laura
lines.text: Oh, it's nothing. I went on a date with a guy who lived in this building and it didn't end very well.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Ohh... that wouldn't by any chance be... Joey Tribbiani?

lines.speaker: Laura
lines.text: Yes!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Of course it was!

lines.speaker: Laura
lines.text: Yeah, we had a really great night and in the morning he promised he would call me and he didn't.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: RAT BASTARD!

lines.speaker: Laura
lines.text: So you're not friends with him? Monica and

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: OH GOD NO! Nope, no, no, no. No! No, no. Nope! No, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no. NO! No!

lines.speaker: Laura
lines.text: Well, I'm sorry I brought it up. So, are either one of you planning on staying at home with your child...

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hellooo? Anybody in there order a celebrity? OW!
lines.stage_direction: form the other side of the door He starts to enter the apartment and Chandler runs to the door and shuts it back in his face

lines.speaker: Laura
lines.text: What was that?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh, it's just some crazy guy who roams the halls here. He's great with kids though.

scenes.scene_description: Monica’s apartment. Somebody knocks the door

scenes.location: Ross and Rachel are at the playground with Emma. Rachel in putting her back in the stroller and Ross is tending to his wound

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, oh Ross, oh my God, are you okay?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: SON OF A BITCH! Oh relax! I didn't say the 'F' word!
lines.stage_direction: turns to his right to see three kids staring at him To the kids They go away

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ross, see! I told you, those swings are evil! Alright, that is it. That is the last time Emma is getting on one of those things for her entire life.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No! No, no, no, no, okay, it wasn't the swing's fault. It was my fault and kind of that kids fault. Who is still laughing. Nice.
lines.stage_direction: point to the kid that kicked him

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ross, c'mon, please. Can we just get out of here, before somebody else gets hurt?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No wait, okay, okay, I have an idea. I want you to get on the swing, okay? And you'll see that there's nothing to be afraid of.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I know what this is all about... You've always been jealous of my hair.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Look, I just think you're an adult, okay? And you should get over your silly fears.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Alright fine. I'll do it.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Good.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: If you hold a spider.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: WHAT? WHERE? WHERE?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: IF you hold a spider.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I know.

scenes.location: Chandler and Monica's apartment. Chandler is still leaning against the door

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Guys? Everything ok? It's me, Joe...

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA......AAAaaa-doption!!

lines.speaker: Laura
lines.text: What's going on?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh, just like I said. That crazy... Bert... roaming the halls.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Guys!?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Keep on roaming Bert! We don't want any crazy today!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: What's going on?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: WE'LL TALK TO YOU LATER, BERT. EVERYTHNG'S FINE!!

lines.text: Everything doesn't sound fine!

lines.speaker: Laura
lines.text: Is he alright out there by himself?

lines.text: Oh yeah! He has a caretaker. His older brother... Ernie.

lines.speaker: Laura
lines.text: Bert and Ernie!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You can't make this stuff up!

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: You never told me about that guy on your sweet sixteen. Oh, ugh. I'm sorry about that.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh! It ended okay. One of my friends shot him.

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: Well, hey, at least you're getting a proper wedding. I mean, you really deserve that.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah, I really do. You know, I had nothing growing up. Just like the kids I took the money from.

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: No! No, no. I see where this is going. Don't make me go back there.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Look, I can't have a wedding with this money now. It's tainted.

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: Alright, fine. We'll give the money back.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: And if that guy at the charity gives us a hard time, my friend hasn't shot anyone in a really long time.

lines.speaker: Laura
lines.text: Well, I must say, this seems like a lovely environment to raise a child in.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh, by the way, you are more than welcome to look under any of the furniture, because, believe me, you won't find any porn or cigarettes under there!

lines.text: Oh! Well, actually, before we look around, let me make sure I have everything I need up to here...
lines.stage_direction: She starts checking her form. Chandler sees movement near the window from the corner of his eye and when he looks he spots Joey climbing up the fire escape and onto their balcony. He warns Monica silently.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Why don't I show you the baby's room?
lines.stage_direction: Pulls Laura into the spare room Joey enters through the side window and jogs towards the kitchen holding a baseball bat

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: What the hell are you doing?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Well, you wouldn't let me in, so I thought you were in trouble.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well, we're not.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: But you called me 'Bert'!? That's our code word for danger!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: We don't have a code word.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: We don't? We really should. From now on, 'Bert' will be our code word for danger.

scenes.scene_description: Monica and Chandler's. They are preparing to show Laura around. Laura is standing with her back to the window, Chandler and Monica are standing on either side of her, facing each other.

scenes.location: Monica and Chandler's. They are preparing to show Laura around. Laura is standing with her back to the window

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: So that was the baby's room.
lines.stage_direction: They come out and Chandler throws Joey behind the couch and puts his foot on him. Monica looks at Chandler

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What room should we see next?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Any room that isn't behind this couch!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Some people don't get him, but I think he's really funny! .
lines.stage_direction: laughs nervously as well, Laura looks confused To Laura She takes Laura to their own bedroom

scenes.scene_description: Monica talks loudly in the baby's room

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I did not care for that!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You have to get out of here. You slept with our social worker and you never called her back and she is still pissed, so she can't see you.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Ok, ok!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Ok!
lines.stage_direction: Joey leaves and closes the door behind him. Chandler walks towards the living room, but then Joey enters again.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I forgot my bat.
lines.stage_direction: He picks up his bat and holds it up, but then Monica and Laura enter the living room again. When Laura sees Joey, she freezes...

lines.speaker: Laura
lines.text: Oh my God!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: And for the last time, we do not want to be friends with you! And we don't want to buy your bat!

lines.speaker: Laura
lines.text: What are you doing here?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Bert! Bert! Bert! Bert!

lines.speaker: Laura
lines.text: Are you friends with him?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I can explain... Joey...

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Uhm... ok... uhm... Well, yeah... You have got some nerve, coming back here. I can't believe you never called me.

lines.speaker: Laura
lines.text: Excuse me?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh... yeah... Probably you don't even remember my name. It's Joey, by the way. And don't bother telling me yours, because I totally remember it... lady. Yeah! I waited weeks for you to call me.

lines.speaker: Laura
lines.text: I gave you my number, you never called me.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No, no! Don't try to turn this around on me, ok? I'm not some kind of... social work, ok, that you can just... do.

lines.speaker: Laura
lines.text: Well, I'm pretty sure I gave you my number.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Really? Think about it. Come on! You're a beautiful woman, smart, funny, we had a really good time, huh? If I had your number, why wouldn't I call you?

lines.speaker: Laura
lines.text: I don't know... Well, maybe I'm wrong... I'm sorry...

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No, no, hey, no! Too late for apologies... ok? You broke my heart. You know how many women I had to sleep with to get over you?
lines.stage_direction: and he leaves the apartment, leaving her shocked

lines.speaker: Laura
lines.text: Joey, wait!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: NO! I waited a long time, I can't wait anymore...
lines.stage_direction: acting sad and closes the door behind him

lines.speaker: Laura
lines.text: I'm sorry that you had to see that. I'm so embarrassed...

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh, that's really ok.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yeah, that we totally understand. Dating is hard.

lines.speaker: Laura
lines.text: Boy, you people are nice... And I've got to say... I think you're going to make excellent parents.

scenes.scene_description: Joey gets up and look annoyed

scenes.location: Monica and Chandler's. They are preparing to show Laura around. Laura is standing with her back to the window

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: LAURA!
lines.stage_direction: and points to her, very confident

scenes.scene_description: Chandler and Monica hug each other, and then Joey enters the apartment again.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: We're back!

lines.speaker: Charity guy
lines.text: Are you here to take more money? Because, I think what you're looking for is an ATM.

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: No, no, we're here to give the money back.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah, because you know what, it's... it's all about the children.
lines.stage_direction: the Charity guy smiles wanting to take the check, but Phoebe pulls it back again. His smile fades.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Although... it's also about the wedding... Ugh, alright... here. No... Oh God... Oh!
lines.stage_direction: she gives the check and pulls it back again

lines.speaker: Charity guy
lines.text: If I haven't said so already sir, congratulations!

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: Ok, look! Enough! Alright? I'm stepping in. I'm putting my foot down! As your future husband I'm going to make this decision for us. Now... what do you think we should do?
lines.stage_direction: takes the check from Phoebe thinking

lines.speaker: Charity guy
lines.text: You know what? It's not your decision anymore.

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Charity guy
lines.text: On behalf of the Children of New York, I reject your money.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: But... but... but we're giving you this!

lines.speaker: Charity guy
lines.text: Yeah... And I'm giving it back to you... Come on! Consider it a contribution.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Well, this is very generous!
lines.stage_direction: looks at the amount on the check, and gasps

lines.speaker: Charity guy
lines.text: Please, take the check, go have a great wedding and a wonderful life together.

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: Well, I mean... It sounds good to me. And that way we can save up, come back in a few years and make an even bigger donation.

lines.speaker: Charity guy
lines.text: Absolutely! And when you do, make sure you ask for Brian.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh, is that you?

lines.speaker: Charity guy
lines.text: No!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hello...? Oh hi... Oh my God...! Really...? I can't wait to tell Chandler... Ok, goodbye.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Wrong number?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: It was Laura... She gave us a great report and we are officially on the waiting list.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: That's great!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Now we just have to wait for a call and... and someone tells us there's a baby waiting for us. Oh...

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hello...? Have you seen Joey's bat?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ok... I got a spider. There were two, I picked the bigger one.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Ok...

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ok...

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: This feels perfectly normal. Ok, get on the swing!
lines.stage_direction: Gasps and speaks at a higher pitch

scenes.scene_description: The playground. Ross, Rachel and Emma are still there. Rachel comes walking to Ross and Emma with something between her hands.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ok...

scenes.scene_description: She slowly grabs the chains of the swing, swings her hair back, and sits down.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: whoo... ok... wow... ok... OH!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: See?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: A-alright! I can do this.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: There you go! Good for you! And you know what, I'm actually getting used to this little guy. I don't really even feel him in here anymore.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well... Whaa... aaah... aaahhh...
lines.stage_direction: realizes, screaming like a little girl, trying to get rid of the spider Ross is now preoccupied with the spider, and forgets that Rachel is still using the swing. While trying to get rid of the spider, he stands in front of Rachel, who bumps into him, throwing him on the ground again.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: ROSS! end

scenes.scene_description: She slowly walks forward and backward, to gain speed...
Central Perk

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey you guys!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey, what are you doing?

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: Oh, figuring out our wedding plans.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: That's funny, we were doing the same thing!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: It's really crazy! The hall, the dress, the food... I-I had no idea how expensive this stuff was!

lines.text: Yeah it is really pricey. I mean, I freaked when I first heard the numbers.

lines.text: So what did you two do about it?

lines.text: It was pretty simple actually, I came up with a couple of cost-cutting solutions, wrote out a list and Monica told me to go to hell.

lines.text: There's no way around it Pheebs, you just gonna have to accept the fact that this is gonna cost you a lot of money.

lines.text: I think it would make me wanna marry you even more.

lines.text: I've got to say you guys, that's an incredible gesture!

lines.text: Chandler?

lines.text: Oh, good!

lines.text: Absolutely.

lines.text: Well, I was thinking of taking Emma to the playground!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh my God, what!?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Like I said I was thinking of taking Emma to the museum of knives and fire!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ok, look, Ross. I do not want Emma going to the playground.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Be-caaauuuse...

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: All right, well, if you must know... I had a traumatic... swing incident... when I was little.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Seriously?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yes, I was 4 years old and I was on the swing and then all of a sudden my hair got tangled in the chain. And to get me out my mom had to-had to cut a big chunk of my hair! And it was uneven for weeks!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: And you made it through that? I wonder who's gonna play you in the movie!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ok, fine! You can make fun of me. I do not want Emma going there. And I was thinking Claire Danes.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Look, I'm sorry to hear about your tragedy, ok? But the swings are perfectly safe, and besides Emma loves them. You know what, you should come with us and you'll see!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ross, those things go like 40 miles an hour! Ok? When you're... and there is that moment when you are at the top, when you just don't know if you're gonna return back to earth!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Space is filled with orbiting children. Look, please, just come on, you know, when you’ll see the look on Emma’s face, I swear you won’t regret it.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: All right!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Good, you don’t want to be one of those mothers who pass on their irrational fears on their children, do you?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Irrational, huh? All right, well, I’ll remember that the next time you freak out about a spider in your apartment!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh, yeah, that’s the same, I am sure there are thirty different species of poisonous swings!

lines.text: Ok.

lines.text: That’s crazy! . I am sorry. I just can’t imagine giving up my one wedding day like that!

lines.text: We, you know, we’re different! We don’t care about having a huge party. This is really nice for you, but, oh, please, I put this on? And, ow, I look , why, well, radiant. All right, well, who cares, I don’t need a pretty veil and a fancy dress.

lines.text: That’s right. You’re making a commitment and that’s the same, whether you do that at the Plaza or, where are you gonna do it?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: City Hall.

lines.text: Ow! Oh, that sounds nice! I am just there for jury duty. They really spruce that place up!

lines.text: It’s ok, it’s ok. I made my decision. What I really want is a great big wedding

lines.text: Yay!

lines.text: But you already gave all your money to charity!

lines.text: I don’t think you can do that!

lines.text: That’s sweet, honey, but save something for the adoption Lady.

lines.text: We’re seriously asking for our money back?

lines.text: It’s for our wedding day! Right, now, is this guy gay or straight, because one of us gonna have to start flirting.

lines.text: Hey, that’s not fair! A person’s wedding is important! And especially to me! Ok? I didn’t have a graduation party! And I didn’t go to Prom. And I spent my sweet sixteen being chased round a tire yard by an escaped mental patient who is his own words wanted to “kill me” or whatever. So I deserve a real celebration and I am not gonna let some sweaty little man make me feel badly about it.

lines.text: Hi, I am Laura, I am here for your adoption interview.

lines.text: Hi, I am Monica and this is Chandler. Please come in.

lines.text: Thank you!

lines.text: Oh, water would be fine.

lines.text: Ok. Great. I am so glad that you are here. We’re really excited about getting this process started.

lines.text: Oh, because we love kids. Love ‘em to death.Well, not actually to death, that's just a figure of speech - we love kids the appropriate amount... as allowed by law.

lines.text: Your place is just lovely.

lines.text: You know, I... I feel like I've been here before. Are any other couples in the building adopting?

lines.text: Oh...

lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Laura
lines.text: Oh, it's nothing. I went on a date with a guy who lived in this building and it didn't end very well.

lines.speaker: Monica

lines.speaker: Laura
lines.text: Yes!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Of course it was!

lines.speaker: Laura
lines.text: Yeah, we had a really great night and in the morning he promised he would call me and he didn't.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: RAT BASTARD!

lines.speaker: Laura
lines.text: So you're not friends with him? Monica and

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: OH GOD NO! Nope, no, no, no. No! No, no. Nope! No, no, no, no, no, no, no, no, no. NO! No!

lines.speaker: Laura
lines.text: Well, I'm sorry I brought it up. So, are either one of you planning on staying at home with your child...

lines.text: Hellooo? Anybody in there order a celebrity? OW!

lines.speaker: Laura
lines.text: What was that?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh, it's just some crazy guy who roams the halls here. He's great with kids though.

lines.text: I did not care for that!

lines.text: You have to get out of here. You slept with our social worker and you never called her back and she is still pissed, so she can't see you.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Ok, ok!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Ok!

lines.text: What?

lines.text: I forgot my bat.

lines.text: Bert! Bert! Bert! Bert!

lines.text: Oh... yeah... Probably you don't even remember my name. It's Joey, by the way. And don't bother telling me yours, because I totally remember it... lady. Yeah! I waited weeks for you to call me.

lines.text: No, no! Don't try to turn this around on me, ok? I'm not some kind of... social work, ok, that you can just... do.

title: Friends - 10.08 The One With The Late Thanksgiving

lines.speaker: Produced by
lines.text: Robert Carlock & Wendy Knoller

scenes.location: Central Perk. Monica and Chandler enter

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey guys! Rachel : Hi! Phoebe : Hey! Monica : We need to talk to you about something. Chandler : Yeah. We don't feel like we can host Thanksgiving this year. All : What? Phoebe : Hey! Ross : Are you kidding? Chandler : Well, it's just with uhm, work and the stress of adoption, we just don't feel like we have the energy. Plus , we don't think it's fair that every year the burden falls on us. Ross : That doesn't sound like you... That's Monica talking! Chandler : No, no! We made this decision together. Ross : She's putting words in your mouth! Joey : Don't you put words in people's mouths, you put turkey in people's mouths! Rachel : I can't believe this! This is Emma's first Thanksgiving! Monica : No, it's not! Rachel : It's not? When was she born? Phoebe : Well, personally I think it's great you're giving yourself a break. Monica : Thank you, Pheebs! Phoebe : Sure. It's just as well... I mean, last year wasn't very good. I think she's losing her touch. Monica : What? You are way off, lady! Phoebe : Am I? Really? Am I? Well, why don't you cook Thanksgiving dinner and prove me wrong! Well, think about it, think about it, you'll be trying to top than you did last year. You'd be in competition... with yourself. Monica : That's my favourite kind! Okay, we are doing this! Chandler : Don't let yourself get manipulated this way! Monica : Hey, stay out of this, Chandler! This is between me... and ME! Chandler : We are supposed to make these decisions together! Did you not watch the Doctor Phil I taped for you?

scenes.scene_description: Central Perk. Monica and Chandler enter, the others are sitting on the couch.

scenes.location: Joey and Rachel's apartment. Rachel and Monica are in there

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hey! Rachel : Hi! Happy Thanksgiving! Phoebe : Oh, yeah, happy needless-turkey-murder day. Monica : You guys, I ordered some chocolate pies from that bakery on Bleecker. Could you pick them up for me? Phoebe : You're not making the pies yourself? Monica : No, no, no, I don't make chocolate pies. When I was younger I-I enter in this pie-eating contest. I ate so many that just the thought of them made me sick. Rachel : Did you at least win the contest? Monica : 2 minutes, 12 pies and a part of one tin! Okay, I see you guys at 4. Rachel : Can't wait! Monica : This dinner is gonna be so great! In your face, last year "me"!

scenes.scene_description: Joey and Rachel's apartment. Rachel and Monica are in there, and Phoebe enters

scenes.location: Monica and Chandler's apartment. Chandler is watching TV and Monica is cooking

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Did someone drop the baton again? Chandler : Why come all the way from Kansas to do that? Monica : I don't get older. I just get better! Chandler : You know what just occurred to me? This could be our last Thanksgiving just the two of us. I mean, we could be getting a baby soon! Monica : You don't know that. Chandler : Somebody is gonna pick us. Monica : Yeah, but we haven't heard a thing from the adoption agency and it has been weeks! Chandler : I'm telling ya! It's gonna happen. Next year it's gonna be you, me and the little Hemingway Bing. What, he's my favourite author! Monica : Name one of his books. Chandler : "The Firm"? Monica : Ok, let's see... uhm, okay, the turkey is in the oven, the stuffing is ready... Chandler : You know, you always cook this meal all by yourself. Let me help this year. Monica : Oh, Chandler, that's sweet. But you don't have to do everything Doctor Phil tells you to do. Chandler : I'm serious, let me do something, just not the turkey or the stuffing, nothing "high profile". Monica : Ok, let's see... Oh, the cranberry sauce, it is easy to make and no-one really cares about it. Chandler : Tell me more. Monica : Okay, I'm gonna go check on something across the hall. You start by washing these Not with soap!! Chandler : You obviously haven't tasted my Palmolive potatoes!
lines.stage_direction: Chandler's laughing she tastes what she has cooked pause after a long pause she gives Chandler a bowl with cranberries. Then, while she's going outside, she sees him with a bottle of soap in his hands she leaves

scenes.scene_description: Monica and Chandler's apartment. Chandler is watching TV and Monica is cooking

lines.speaker: Host
lines.text: This is contestant number sixteen, Rebecca... Phoebe : Hey. Rachel : Oh Phoebe, listen. Well, I think we gotta go. This place is really freaking me out. I've been watching this guy over there, I don't think he came with a kid! Phoebe : We can't leave now! There was this one baby, Haley, who was favourite to win and she got croup, so she had to stay home! This competition just blew wide open, folks! Rachel : Phoebe, I think... It's just too weird, I just saw a one year old running around with pantyhose on! Phoebe : Oh, I know, we should have been more prepared. It's okay. Now, the way I see it, our real competition now is Cameron. Oh my God, they just took her sweater off. Look at those arms! Hello Michelin Man. Rachel : Oh, Phoebe! Come on! You know what, it's already three o'clock and they haven't even gotten to Emma's group yet. We gotta go, we got dinner! Phoebe : But Emma's got what it takes, she could go all the way! Rachel : Phoebe, you have to calm down. Phoebe : Okay. Rachel, the hottest babies in the Tri-State Area are in this room right now! I overheard one of the judges say that not one of them holds a candle to Emma! Rachel : Really? Phoebe : Yeah! Rachel : You heard them say that? Phoebe : Yeah! Rachel : All right, okay. Alright, let's give to these babies something to cry about! Phoebe : Good! Oh yay! Let's get down to business! Emma needs some makeup! Rachel : No, what? Phoebe : Well, she's gonna look all washed out next to the other contestants! Rachel : No Phoebe, I am not letting you put makeup on my baby! Phoebe : Why not! Rachel : Because I already did!

scenes.scene_description: Baby beauty contest
Madison Square Garden

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Where is everybody? They're forty-five minutes late! Chandler : I can't believe they are not here! I slave and I slave for what? They've ruined cranberry day!

scenes.scene_description: Chandler and Monica's apartment.

scenes.location: The corridor. Ross and Joey have just arrived

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: How late are we? Ross : Forty-five minutes. Joey : Wow Ross : Here! Joey : Okay. Rachel and Phoebe are already there, okay? So they probably started without us. We could just slip in and no-one needs to know where we were! Ross : You may want to lose the foam finger! Joey : Oh, no, no, no, no, no. You just want to put it on your hand!
lines.stage_direction: He opens his apartment door and throws their stuff in. handing him his coat he raises his hands and on his right one there's a Rangers foam finger

scenes.scene_description: The corridor. Ross and Joey have just arrived.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Do you hear something? Chandler : They're out there! Monica : Ohhh! Let me see! Oh God, I can't believe this! They're an hour late and they're just staying out there, talking! Chandler : Everything is so distorted! Looks like Joey has a giant hand! Which says "Rangers" on it. They went to the game! Monica : Oooh! They are in for a world of pain! Chandler : Ross' shirt is torn. Monica : Oh! They're late and they're sloppy! [Cut to the hall] what happened to your shirt? Ross : I got mugged. And they stole my pocket. Phoebe : We're just... we're trying to figure out an excuse. Hey! Ooh! How about this: We can say that Monica told us 5 o'clock, not 4 o'clock. That way we're right on time! OR... or, we can plant PCP in the apartment and call the cops on her. Ross : That would be a good way to get rid of all the PCP we have lying around. Rachel : You know what, we just say that she said it was 5 o'clock. We'll just act casual. We're not late, we're right on time. Ross : We know you're out there. Joey : Who do you think its from? [time lapse – they are still in the hall] Rachel : Oh, God. This is bad. This is so bad. Ross : Well, let's just go in there and face them. Phoebe : Well, I'm not going in first. I bet that vein on Monica's forehead is popping like crazy. Joey : I hate that thing, it's like a... bolt of lightning. Rachel : Oh, hey, I have an idea. Why don't we play rock-paper-scissors, and whoever loses goes in first. Ready? . Joey : Ah-haah! I win!! Ross : What is that ? Joey : That's fire. Beats everything. Phoebe : Oh, really? Does it beat water balloon? . Joey : Ooh! Well played, Phoebe Buffay, well played. Rachel : Alright, enough, enough, come on. Let's just all go in at the same time. All : Alright, okay. Phoebe : It's locked. Ross : Wha...? Oh sure, now
lines.stage_direction: Chandlers stands up and goes to the door to look out from the peephole peeping peeping gasps looking through the peephole again Rachel comes out of her apartment} Rachel : Alright, Emma is napping... (then to Ross Others start to agree but she continues sarcastic When she finishes talking, a note is pushed from under Monica's and Chandler's door, into the hall. Ross picks it up and reads it out loud Reading the note Rachel gasps whispering they all agree they do the rock-paper-scissor thing with they hands and Rachel has paper, Phoebe and Ross both have rock, while Joey is doing a strange upward wiggling with his fingers. They all look a him confused smiling from ear to ear She places her hand over his "fire" and mimics a bursting water balloon, thus putting the fire out Phoebe reaches for the door, and tries to open it but it's locked

lines.speaker: they lock it, but when they're having sex on the couch, its like
lines.text: "Come on in, my butt is surprisingly hairy". Rachel : Alright, come on... Alright, you guys. We're so sorry we're late. Please let us in, so we can have dinner together. [cut to Monica and Chandler] Monica : No! Everything's cold. The turkey's dried out and the... the stuffing is all soggy. Chandler : Yeah, and there's a bowl of cranberry sauce that... what happens to cranberry sauce? Monica : Nothing. It's fine. Chandler : Oh thank God! [cut to the hall] Ross : Come on you guys, we're sorry, alri...? Our subway broke down. Chandler : That's a lie, you went to the game, I can see Joey's hand. Ross : FOR THE LOVE OF GOD TAKE IT OFF!! Rachel : You guys, come on, it doesn't matter why we're late. We're all here now, please let us in so we can have some of your delicious turkey. Joey : I had a dream once about a fax machine that did that. [cut to Monica and Chandler] Monica : That's all the turkey you're gonna get. [cut to the hall] Ross : How are we gonna decide who gets this? Joey : WATER BALLOON! Phoebe : What are we gonna do? I'm starving. Rachel : Oh, I just remembered. We do have something to eat. Monica put something in our oven this morning. Phoebe : Oh yeah! [cut to Monica and Chandler] Monica : Hey, you touch that and you will be sorry . Chandler : Guys, I'd listen to her. The vein is bigger than I've ever seen it. [cut to the hall]

lines.text: Hi.

lines.text: Ok.

lines.text: So, the fact that I am a doctor, and my wife’s a reverend, that’s important to you?

lines.text: Wow.

lines.text: Yeah, wow.

lines.text: Being a doctor must take up a lot of time.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: No-ot for me it doesn’t.

lines.text: Why not?

lines.text: It's wrong. They made a mistake. They think we're somebody else.

lines.text: God works in mysterious ways.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You have gotta stop!

lines.text: But she liked us.

lines.text: She likes Doctor Chandler and Reverend Monica.

lines.text: But we are not the one she chose! How can you feel okay about this?

lines.text: I know..

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I mean, who knows how long it's gonna take for someone else to give us a baby? What if, what if no one ever picks us?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: oh, honey..

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Please.. please, we are so close.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Monica, I want a baby too, but this woman is giving away her child. She deserves to know who it's going to.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: okay, right.

She tries a third time and this time, Joey pushes his plate so far to the left, it drops off the edge of the table

scenes.location: The Adoption Agency in Ohio. Monica and Chandler are entering

lines.speaker: Erica
lines.text: Hi! Adoption

lines.speaker: Agency guy
lines.text: Hey.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey.

lines.speaker: Agency guy
lines.text: So, these are the preliminary forms for an open adoption. There's a lot to go over, but I'll explain everything as we go through it.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I-Is... Is that a picture?
lines.stage_direction: pointing to a picture on the table

lines.speaker: Erica
lines.text: Yeah. It's a sonogram they took of the baby last week. I thought you might want to see it.
lines.stage_direction: gives it to Monica, who looks at it for a long time, and then shows it to Chandler

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Look, doctor! Look, before we sign anything we really have to talk... We're not who you think we are.
lines.stage_direction: Chandler takes Monica's hand, and gets serious pause

lines.speaker: Agency guy
lines.text: I don't understand.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: The agency must have made some mistake. My wife is not a reverend and I'm not a doctor.

lines.speaker: Erica
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Agency guy
lines.text: That's impossible.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I could perform an operation on you and prove it if you'd like.

lines.speaker: Agency guy
lines.text: I'll go check your file. Excuse me.

lines.speaker: Erica
lines.text: So who are you?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well, our names really are Monica and Chandler. We're from New York.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yeah, but the important thing to know about us, is how much we would care for this little baby.

lines.speaker: Erica
lines.text: So you lied to me before?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Well, we... "bore false witness"... See I could be a reverend.
lines.stage_direction: makes quotation signs in the air

lines.speaker: Erica
lines.text: I can't believe this.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: But we were hoping that since we told you the truth that you still might consider...

lines.speaker: Erica
lines.text: Giving you my baby? You think I'd give you my child after this?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Well, you don't have to decide right now, but if you could just look at our file...

lines.speaker: Erica
lines.text: I don't want to look at your file! This is over.

scenes.scene_description: The Adoption Agency in Ohio. Monica and Chandler are entering.

scenes.location: The Adoption Agency in Ohio. Monica and Chandler are entering

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Erica wait!

lines.speaker: Erica
lines.text: I've nothing to say to you.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You have every reason to be upset. We did lie. But only because we've been waiting and trying to have a baby for so long. Now we don't know how long it's gonna be before we can get another chance again.

lines.speaker: Erica
lines.text: Why don't you ask the reverend to pray on it?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Erica, please. Just consider us. Ask them to see our file. Our last name's Bing. My wife's a chef and I'm in advertising.

lines.speaker: Erica
lines.text: Oh yeah. I actually liked you guys. But it doesn't matter, because what you did was wrong.
lines.stage_direction: walks away again, but Chandler catches up with her again

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: But you did like us. And you should. My wife's an incredible woman. She's loving and devoted and caring. And don't tell her I said this but the woman's always right... I love my wife more than anything in this world. And I... It kills me that I can't give her a baby... I really want a kid. And when that day finally comes, I'll learn how to be a good dad. But my wife... she's already there. She's a mother... without a baby... Please?

scenes.scene_description: She leaves the room, but Chandler runs after her. They meet in the hallway.

scenes.location: The Adoption Agency in Ohio. Monica and Chandler are entering

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You still want that baby?

scenes.scene_description: They look at each other. We switch back to Monica. Chandler opens the door and she turns to look at him.

scenes.location: The Adoption Agency in Ohio. Monica and Chandler are entering

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: God bless you Chandler Bing!

scenes.scene_description: Monica plays those words back in her mind and then smiles and runs to Chandler, who is twisting with joy. They hug.

scenes.location: Central Perk. Everyone's sitting on the couch.Monica and Chandler enter

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hi!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: We're just here to say goodbye, we're off to Ohio.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh, right! Your adoption interview!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yep, we're gonna meet the lady who could be carrying our baby.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I can't believe it. When you guys come back, you're gonna have a baby! That is so weird!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: And so incorrect!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: She's only a couple of months pregnant. She liked our application but who knows if she's gonna like us.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Come on, she's gonna love you guys!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Uhm, thank you, but we're really trying not to get our hopes up.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: And a lot could still get in our way.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah. I mean, this girl could decide against adoption or she could like another couple better..

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: What are you gonna name the baby?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I can develop a condition in which I talk and talk and no one hears a word.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: But just think, ok? What if everything goes right? What if this woman does pick you guys?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh my God. She's gonna pick us!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: So we're standing firm on the 'not getting our hopes up'?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: You know, I know that things could still go wrong but if they don't? If this works out, we're gonna have a baby Chandler, a baby!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yes, but...

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh my God, it's gonna WORK! We're gonna make it work! I'm gonna be a mummy and you're gonna be a daddy! All right, I'll see you suckers. I'm gonna get me... A BABY! {she leaves)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh, screw it, I'm gonna be a daddy!!

scenes.location: Central Perk. Phoebe's speaking to a girl

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hey, who's Phoebe with?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I'm gonna say someone I'm gonna have sex with. Hey!
lines.stage_direction: the girl leaves and Phoebe goes toward the couch to Phoebe

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: So... who's your friend?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh, that's Sarah. No, no. Don't you get any ideas, ok? No, I'm not setting you up with any more of my friends!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: OW, why, why, why?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Because you'll date her once, sleep with her and then forget she exists!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh, name one friend of yours that I did that with.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Mandy.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Mandy, uh? Uh... really hot blonde, big boobs?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I know why I don't remember her, huh?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Do you think I'm someone else?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Ok, I may not have treated your friends well in the past, but I have grown up a lot, really. Honest, Rach?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well, believe it or not, it's true. When Joey and I were together, he was wonderful. He was thoughtful and mature. And for the one week that we went out, he didn't sleep with anybody else!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Growth!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Fine, I'll give you her number.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Ok, thank you. And I promise you I will not forget this one. Mandy.
lines.stage_direction: he starts writing on his hand

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: SARAH!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Saraaah.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hi!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey you guys, I need some fashion advice.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: How does this look?
lines.stage_direction: he takes a baby blue beret out of a shopping box and puts it on

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well, it's a little low... pick up a little... a little bit more... a little bit more... There you go! Now throw it away!
lines.stage_direction: Ross picks it up he picks it up again he takes it off pause

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: C'mon! This looks good!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ross, please, trust me. I buy 30 fashion magazines a month. Now, I don't know who's running for president or who that... NATO guy is, but I do know that you have to get as far away as you can from that hat.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Damnit! I have this date tomorrow night and I have to look cool!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Well, you know, if you want fashion help, Rachel and I are going shopping tomorrow. You're more than welcome to come with us, right?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Really? That would be great. I mean, I have to do something, she kinda teased me about how I dress.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I can see why, nice shirt!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: You're wearing the same shirt.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Stupid Gap on every corner!

lines.text: Please, make yourself comfortable and I will back in a moment with Erica.

lines.text: Ok, thank you. Uh, well this is it. Are you OK?

lines.text: "Hi, I'm Chandler. May I have the human growing inside you?"

lines.text: I don't think that's exactly...

lines.text: Let her finish, doctor.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: That’s it? That’s why you won’t go out with her again? So, she took some fries, big deal!

lines.text: Hey, hey, look! It’s not about a few fries... it’s about what the fries represent.

lines.text: ALL FOOD!

lines.speaker: Phoebe

lines.text: Hey, hey, hey, hey. Look. I take a girl out, she can order whatever she wants! The more, the better! All right? Just don’t order a Garden salad and then eat my food! That’s a good way to lose some fingers!

lines.text: What? You know about the plate thing?

lines.text: I like that! A sharing buffer! Yeah! I’ll order some extra fries! Maybe a plate of onion rings. Yeah. And a shrimp cocktail. And some buffalo wings. Maybe an individual pizza, uh? And some mozzarella sticks. What were we talking about?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: We are NOT signing those papers.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Why not?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: It's wrong. They made a mistake. They think we're somebody else.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: God works in mysterious ways.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You have gotta stop!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: But she liked us.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: She likes Doctor Chandler and Reverend Monica.

lines.text: C'mon Chandler, I think we have been given an opportunity. I mean, the mistake has already been made. They are writing up the paper right now.

lines.text: But we are not the one she chose! How can you feel okay about this?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Because... We may not be who she thinks we are but no-one will ever love that baby more than us.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I know..

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I mean, who knows how long it's gonna take for someone else to give us a baby? What if, what if no one ever picks us?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: oh, honey..

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Please.. please, we are so close.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Monica, I want a baby too, but this woman is giving away her child. She deserves to know who it's going to.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: okay, right.

scenes.scene_description: Joey's looking at Sarah's dessert, and takes her plate.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Stop staring at me!

scenes.scene_description: Joey sits sideways on his chair, looking at Sarah's chocolate torte, and then looking away from it, nervously playing with his fork, drumming with it on the table every now and then.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Why, just a tiny little...

scenes.scene_description: He then straightens himself, and looks at the torte

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh-oh! TIME LAPSE

scenes.scene_description: He takes a little piece of Sarah's dessert. At first he doesn't think it's that special, but then...

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I'm not even sorry.

scenes.scene_description: Sarah enters the room again, and stops when she sees her dessert is missing. Joey has emptied her plate, and has a chocolate covered mouth, just like a kid.

scenes.location: The Adoption Agency in Ohio. Monica and Chandler are entering

lines.speaker: Erica
lines.text: Hi! Adoption

lines.speaker: Agency guy
lines.text: Hey.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey.

lines.speaker: Agency guy
lines.text: So, these are the preliminary forms for an open adoption. There's a lot to go over, but I'll explain everything as we go through it.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I-Is... Is that a picture?
lines.stage_direction: pointing to a picture on the table

lines.speaker: Erica
lines.text: Yeah. It's a sonogram they took of the baby last week. I thought you might want to see it.
lines.stage_direction: gives it to Monica, who looks at it for a long time, and then shows it to Chandler

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Look, doctor! Look, before we sign anything we really have to talk... We're not who you think we are.
lines.stage_direction: Chandler takes Monica's hand, and gets serious pause

lines.speaker: Agency guy
lines.text: I don't understand.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: The agency must have made some mistake. My wife is not a reverend and I'm not a doctor.

lines.speaker: Erica
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Agency guy
lines.text: That's impossible.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I could perform an operation on you and prove it if you'd like.

lines.speaker: Agency guy
lines.text: I'll go check your file. Excuse me.

lines.speaker: Erica
lines.text: So who are you?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well, our names really are Monica and Chandler. We're from New York.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yeah, but the important thing to know about us, is how much we would care for this little baby.

lines.speaker: Erica
lines.text: So you lied to me before?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Well, we... "bore false witness"... See I could be a reverend.
lines.stage_direction: makes quotation signs in the air

lines.speaker: Erica
lines.text: I can't believe this.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: But we were hoping that since we told you the truth that you still might consider...

lines.speaker: Erica
lines.text: Giving you my baby? You think I'd give you my child after this?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Well, you don't have to decide right now, but if you could just look at our file...

lines.speaker: Erica
lines.text: I don't want to look at your file! This is over.

scenes.scene_description: The Adoption Agency in Ohio. Monica and Chandler are entering.

scenes.location: The Adoption Agency in Ohio. Monica and Chandler are entering

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Erica wait!

lines.speaker: Erica
lines.text: I've nothing to say to you.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You have every reason to be upset. We did lie. But only because we've been waiting and trying to have a baby for so long. Now we don't know how long it's gonna be before we can get another chance again.

lines.speaker: Erica
lines.text: Why don't you ask the reverend to pray on it?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Erica, please. Just consider us. Ask them to see our file. Our last name's Bing. My wife's a chef and I'm in advertising.

lines.speaker: Erica
lines.text: Oh yeah. I actually liked you guys. But it doesn't matter, because what you did was wrong.
lines.stage_direction: walks away again, but Chandler catches up with her again

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: But you did like us. And you should. My wife's an incredible woman. She's loving and devoted and caring. And don't tell her I said this but the woman's always right... I love my wife more than anything in this world. And I... It kills me that I can't give her a baby... I really want a kid. And when that day finally comes, I'll learn how to be a good dad. But my wife... she's already there. She's a mother... without a baby... Please?

scenes.scene_description: She leaves the room, but Chandler runs after her. They meet in the hallway.

scenes.location: The Adoption Agency in Ohio. Monica and Chandler are entering

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You still want that baby?

scenes.scene_description: They look at each other. We switch back to Monica. Chandler opens the door and she turns to look at him.

scenes.location: The Adoption Agency in Ohio. Monica and Chandler are entering

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: God bless you Chandler Bing!

scenes.scene_description: Monica plays those words back in her mind and then smiles and runs to Chandler, who is twisting with joy. They hug.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Turns out this sweater is made for a woman.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: So, why are you still wearing it?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Because it's soft... Hey, so how was your date?

lines.text: Ooh... Not so good.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: JOEY DOESN'T SHARE FOOD!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh, my friend Sarah had a great time last night.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Well...

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah! So you're gonna call this one back?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Nope.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: What are you talking about? Sarah's great!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh, really? You know what your great friend did? We're out to dinner, ok? We're getting along, having a really nice time. I was thinking she was really cool. And then, out of nowhere...
lines.stage_direction: he starts talking about the date and we can see what happened through a flashback video

scenes.scene_description: they shake hands the way friends would. There's a muffin on the table, and Ross breaks off a piece and wants to put it in his mouth.

scenes.location: Central Perk. Joey's on the couch when Ross walks to him

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: That’s it? That’s why you won’t go out with her again? So, she took some fries, big deal!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey, hey, look! It’s not about a few fries... it’s about what the fries represent.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: ALL FOOD!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I’m sorry, I can’t believe I set you up with such a MONSTER!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey, hey, hey, hey. Look. I take a girl out, she can order whatever she wants! The more, the better! All right? Just don’t order a Garden salad and then eat my food! That’s a good way to lose some fingers!

scenes.scene_description: Sarah picks up some fries from Joey’s plate and Joey looks very angry. Then we’re back to Central Perk and Joey does a you-see-what-I-mean look to Phoebe

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh
