lines.text: Hi

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Thank God you’re here. Listen to this!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: what?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Joey and my friend were out last night and having dinner and she reaches over and takes a few of his fries...

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh! Oh, no!

scenes.scene_description: Rachel enters from the main door

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: What? You know about the plate thing?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, yeah. Joey doesn’t share food. I mean, just last week we were having breakfast and he had a couple of grapes on his plate and ...

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: You wouldn’t let her have a grape?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh no! Not me! Emma!

scenes.scene_description: Joey looks satisfied

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: JOEY DOESN’T SHARE FOOD!
lines.stage_direction: mad and pointing a finger to himself

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Well, I still think that it’s a stupid reason not to call someone again. You are calling her! And if you need to, just get an extra plate of fries for the table!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I like that! A sharing buffer! Yeah! I’ll order some extra fries! Maybe a plate of onion rings. Yeah. And a shrimp cocktail. And some buffalo wings. Maybe an individual pizza, uh? And some mozzarella sticks. What were we talking about?
lines.stage_direction: he thinks a little, considering the option and seems to be quite satisfied he looks absorbed in his food thoughts

scenes.scene_description: Phoebe looks horrified and she turns to watch Joey

lines.text: So, the fact that I am a doctor, and my wife’s a reverend, that’s important to you?

lines.text: Yeah, I read some great applications, but then I thought “who better then a minister to raise a child!”

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Amen.

lines.text: Plus I thought the baby would be in good hands with a doctor!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Uh, good hands. Healing hands.

lines.speaker: Erica
lines.text: Reverend, can I ask? Does the bible say anything about adoption?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: It says “Do it!”. And behold she did adopt onto them a baby. And it was good.

lines.speaker: Erica
lines.text: Wow.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah, wow.

lines.speaker: Erica
lines.text: I was wondering you both have such serious jobs. Would you have time to take care of a baby and your flock?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh, you know, my flock is good, I mean, yeah, my flock pretty much takes care of themselves at this point. Good flock. Flock, flock, flock.

lines.speaker: Erica
lines.text: Being a doctor must take up a lot of time.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: No-ot for me it doesn’t.

scenes.scene_description: The Adoption Agency in Ohio. Monica and Chandler are still talking with Erica.

lines.speaker: Agency guy
lines.text: So, how’s everything going in here?

lines.speaker: Erica
lines.text: We’re great, I think I may have asked all my questions.

lines.speaker: Agency guy
lines.text: Do you have any question for Erica?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah, actually. So, you read a file that you liked and you gave the agency the serial number and they contacted us?

lines.speaker: Agency guy
lines.text: Yes, our system assures total anonimity. We’re very proud of it.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You should be. You’re really on top of stuff..

lines.speaker: Agency guy
lines.text: Well, then if there’s nothing else, then the two of us should talk.

lines.speaker: Erica
lines.text: Actually, I don’t think we have to.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: We don’t?

lines.speaker: Erica
lines.text: Yeah, when I read about you two, I was pretty sure I wanted you, but I just thought we should meet face to face. . I've made my decision. I choose them.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh my God, this is great! This is so great! . Did you hear that?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah, I did.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey, thank you. Thank you so much. . You are SO going to Heaven!

lines.text: oh, well, Ross probably has it, you can get it from him later.

scenes.location: Monica and Chandler's hotel room. They enter

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: We are NOT signing those papers.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Why not?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: It's wrong. They made a mistake. They think we're somebody else.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: God works in mysterious ways.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You have gotta stop!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: But she liked us.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: She likes Doctor Chandler and Reverend Monica.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Well, if you think about it, I am kind of like a Reverend. I mean, as a chef, I serve God, by feeing the hungry and poor.
lines.stage_direction: looks very convinced about what she just said

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Your Veal Chop is $34,95!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: C'mon Chandler, I think we have been given an opportunity. I mean, the mistake has already been made. They are writing up the paper right now.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: But we are not the one she chose! How can you feel okay about this?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Because... We may not be who she thinks we are but no-one will ever love that baby more than us.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I know..

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I mean, who knows how long it's gonna take for someone else to give us a baby? What if, what if no one ever picks us?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: oh, honey..

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Please.. please, we are so close.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Monica, I want a baby too, but this woman is giving away her child. She deserves to know who it's going to.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: okay, right.
lines.stage_direction: realizes Chandler is right. She's almost crying They hug

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: So, we'll tell the truth and who knows, maybe she'll like us for us.

lines.text: Maybe she will. Uh! Why couldn't I have been a Reverend?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Technicality!

lines.text: Plus I thought the baby would be in good hands with a doctor!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Uh, good hands. Healing hands.

lines.speaker: Erica
lines.text: Reverend, can I ask? Does the bible say anything about adoption?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: It says “Do it!”. And behold she did adopt onto them a baby. And it was good.

lines.speaker: Erica
lines.text: Wow.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah, wow.

lines.speaker: Erica
lines.text: I was wondering you both have such serious jobs. Would you have time to take care of a baby and your flock?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh, you know, my flock is good, I mean, yeah, my flock pretty much takes care of themselves at this point. Good flock. Flock, flock, flock.

lines.speaker: Erica
lines.text: Being a doctor must take up a lot of time.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: No-ot for me it doesn’t.

scenes.scene_description: The Adoption Agency in Ohio. Monica and Chandler are still talking with Erica.

scenes.location: The Adoption Agency in Ohio. Monica and Chandler are still talking with Erica

lines.speaker: Agency guy
lines.text: So, how’s everything going in here?

lines.speaker: Erica
lines.text: We’re great, I think I may have asked all my questions.

lines.speaker: Agency guy
lines.text: Do you have any question for Erica?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah, actually. So, you read a file that you liked and you gave the agency the serial number and they contacted us?

lines.speaker: Agency guy
lines.text: Yes, our system assures total anonimity. We’re very proud of it.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You should be. You’re really on top of stuff..

lines.speaker: Agency guy
lines.text: Well, then if there’s nothing else, then the two of us should talk.

lines.speaker: Erica
lines.text: Actually, I don’t think we have to.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: We don’t?

lines.speaker: Erica
lines.text: Yeah, when I read about you two, I was pretty sure I wanted you, but I just thought we should meet face to face. . I've made my decision. I choose them.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh my God, this is great! This is so great! . Did you hear that?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah, I did.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey, thank you. Thank you so much. . You are SO going to Heaven!

scenes.scene_description: The agency guy enters the room

scenes.location: Joey’s apartment. Rachel and Phoebe walk in

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: We got some really great stuff!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah, yeah but I am not sure about some of the bra's I got.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh! Really? Do you wanna try some of them on for me?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh! okay. Wait, are we in Joey's imagination?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh no! I took one of Ross' bags by mistake, and one of mine is missing.
lines.stage_direction: looking into one of her shopping bags

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: oh, well, Ross probably has it, you can get it from him later.

scenes.scene_description: Joey’s apartment. Rachel and Phoebe walk in, loaded with bags.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: So? What do you think?
lines.stage_direction: to Joey Shows himself - Joey observes him with a strange look on his face.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I think were not wearing the same shirt anymore!!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah! Yeah! Rachel picked it out for me. She told me to trust her and you know what? I'm glad I did! I turned quite a few heads on my way over here.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Dude, I really don't think you should be wearing that.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh, I see, somebody is afraid of a little competition with the ladies?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Looks like someone IS the ladies!!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: You're just jealous because you couldn't pull this off. Yeah, now if you'll excuse me I have a date. See? ALL eyes on ME!
lines.stage_direction: getting up and taking his coat As he is walking out, everyone turns and stares at him To Joey

scenes.scene_description: Ross walks into Central Perk, wearing a pink and white ladies shirt. Joey is on the couch

scenes.location: Monica and Chandler's hotel room. They enter

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: We are NOT signing those papers.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Why not?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: It's wrong. They made a mistake. They think we're somebody else.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: God works in mysterious ways.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You have gotta stop!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: But she liked us.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: She likes Doctor Chandler and Reverend Monica.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Well, if you think about it, I am kind of like a Reverend. I mean, as a chef, I serve God, by feeing the hungry and poor.
lines.stage_direction: looks very convinced about what she just said

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Your Veal Chop is $34,95!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: C'mon Chandler, I think we have been given an opportunity. I mean, the mistake has already been made. They are writing up the paper right now.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: But we are not the one she chose! How can you feel okay about this?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Because... We may not be who she thinks we are but no-one will ever love that baby more than us.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I know..

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I mean, who knows how long it's gonna take for someone else to give us a baby? What if, what if no one ever picks us?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: oh, honey..

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Please.. please, we are so close.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Monica, I want a baby too, but this woman is giving away her child. She deserves to know who it's going to.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: okay, right.
lines.stage_direction: realizes Chandler is right. She's almost crying They hug

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: So, we'll tell the truth and who knows, maybe she'll like us for us.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Maybe she will. Uh! Why couldn't I have been a Reverend?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You're Jewish.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Technicality!

scenes.scene_description: Monica and Chandler's hotel room. They enter.

scenes.location: A restaurant. Joey is on his date with Phoebe’s friend

lines.speaker: Waiter
lines.text: A garden salad for the lady

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh, that looks great! Good ordering!

lines.speaker: Waiter
lines.text: Seafood platter for the gentleman and extra fries. Enjoy!

lines.speaker: Sarah
lines.text: Mmmh, those fries look delicious.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: oh, I didn't know you liked French fries. Help yourself! What's mine is yours.
lines.stage_direction: Sarah reaches over and takes a few fries

lines.speaker: Sarah
lines.text: Oh wow, are those stuffed clams?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Uuuh.. yes, they are my stuffed clams.

scenes.scene_description: A restaurant. Joey is on his date with Phoebe’s friend, Sarah. They are sitting opposite each other on a table for two. Their waiter approaches with two plates.

scenes.location: A restaurant. Joey is on his date with Phoebe’s friend

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: How about those fries though, huh?
lines.stage_direction: Holds the plate between Sarah’s fingers and his plate, thus blocking her from reaching his

lines.speaker: Sarah
lines.text: They are delicious
lines.stage_direction: takes a few from the plate, puts one in her mouth and places the rest on her plate, then starts to reach over to Joey's platter again

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: You are beautiful, you know that?
lines.stage_direction: Spotting her movements takes her hand into his own

lines.speaker: Sarah
lines.text: Oh, that is so sweet..

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh okay..
lines.stage_direction: grinning, trying to hold in his impatience with her she takes her hand back

scenes.scene_description: Sarah, is grinning and starts to reach over to Joey's plate to take a few clams

scenes.location: A restaurant. Joey is on his date with Phoebe’s friend

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: NOW look what you did!!

lines.speaker: Sarah
lines.text: What? what is the matter with you?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I don't like it when people take food off of my plate, okay?

lines.speaker: Sarah
lines.text: But you just said "What's mine is yours"?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: WELL, I DIDN'T MEAN IT!

lines.speaker: Sarah
lines.text: Fine, I'm sorry, I didn't think it was that big a deal.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I'm sorry, I'm overreacting. Okay, It's just when it comes to food, I have certain rules, okay, I mean There are things you do..and you now, things.. that you don't do .
lines.stage_direction: bends down and with his plate and his hands, scrapes the dropped dinner back onto the plate and puts it back on the table takes something from the plate and blows it a little He takes a bite from it

scenes.scene_description: Then she reaches over again and Joey moves his plate a little to the left, and she misses, then she reaches out again, and he moves his plate to the right , so she misses again. She tries a third time and this time, Joey pushes his plate so far to the left, it drops off the edge of the table

scenes.location: A restaurant. Joey is on his date with Phoebe’s friend
scenes.scene_description: Sarah looks a little disgusted

scenes.location: Ross and his date walk into a lobby. They are both wearing their jackets

lines.speaker: Girl
lines.text: Wow, this place looks great.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh! You are gonna love it! and I'm so glad, we're finally doing this.
lines.stage_direction: The girl is looking in the other direction as Ross is taking off his own coat, revealing the pink and white ladies shirt

lines.speaker: Girl
lines.text: Me too!
lines.stage_direction: starts to take her coat off

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Here So this was fun!
lines.stage_direction: gets behind her to help. When the coat comes off we see she is wearing the exact same shirt Ross is wearing. They look at each other, shocked. They abruptly put their coat back on They leave the room and head into opposite directions

scenes.scene_description: Ross and his date walk into a lobby. They are both wearing their jackets

scenes.location: Back at the restaurant with Joey and Sarah. Joey is holding Sarah's hands

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I really am sorry about, you know..before. I just want to make sure you know that I really do like you.

lines.speaker: Sarah
lines.text: Sure Just not as much as clams.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Well, stuffed clams.

scenes.scene_description: Back at the restaurant with Joey and Sarah. Joey is holding Sarah's hands

scenes.location: Back at the restaurant with Joey and Sarah. Joey is holding Sarah's hands

lines.speaker: Waiter
lines.text: Chocolate Torte for the lady, cheesecake for the gentleman.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Uh, excuse me sir, there seems to be some sort of red crap on my cheesecake.

lines.speaker: Waiter
lines.text: Yes, that's Raspberry coule.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: So stupid, ordering cheesecake, trying to be healthy.
lines.stage_direction: More to himself than anyone else pushes it aside

lines.speaker: Sarah
lines.text: Oh my God!
lines.stage_direction: tasting hers Looks at the waiter and then to Joey

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh, all right, I'll just have what she's having instead.

lines.speaker: Waiter
lines.text: Oh, I'm sorry sir, that was our last piece.

lines.speaker: Sarah
lines.text: Mmmm! Mmm!

scenes.scene_description: The waiter arrives with their deserts

lines.speaker: Sarah
lines.text: Oh, no! This is work. I should call in. Can you excuse me?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh yeah, sure. No problem.

scenes.scene_description: Sarah's beeper starts bleeping

lines.speaker: Sarah
lines.text: What are you doing? I thought you don't share food.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Sure I do. Coule?

lines.speaker: Sarah
lines.text: No. If I can't have your clams, you can't have my dessert. This is a two way street.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Really?

lines.speaker: Sarah
lines.text: Really! Now this all better be here when I come back.
lines.stage_direction: puts her plate back at her side of the table

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah, of course. I can control myself.
lines.stage_direction: laughs uneasily and Sarah leaves the room

scenes.scene_description: Joey's looking at Sarah's dessert, and takes her plate.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Stop staring at me!

scenes.scene_description: Joey sits sideways on his chair, looking at Sarah's chocolate torte, and then looking away from it, nervously playing with his fork, drumming with it on the table every now and then.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Why, just a tiny little...

scenes.scene_description: He then straightens himself, and looks at the torte

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh-oh!

scenes.scene_description: He takes a little piece of Sarah's dessert. At first he doesn't think it's that special, but then...

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I'm not even sorry.

scenes.scene_description: Sarah enters the room again, and stops when she sees her dessert is missing. Joey has emptied her plate, and has a chocolate covered mouth, just like a kid.

scenes.location: The Adoption Agency in Ohio. Monica and Chandler are entering

lines.speaker: Erica
lines.text: Hi!

lines.speaker: Agency guy
lines.text: Hey.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey.

lines.speaker: Agency guy
lines.text: So, these are the preliminary forms for an open adoption. There's a lot to go over, but I'll explain everything as we go through it.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I-Is... Is that a picture?
lines.stage_direction: pointing to a picture on the table

lines.speaker: Erica
lines.text: Yeah. It's a sonogram they took of the baby last week. I thought you might want to see it.
lines.stage_direction: gives it to Monica, who looks at it for a long time, and then shows it to Chandler

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Look, doctor!

lines.speaker: Agency guy
lines.text: I don't understand.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: The agency must have made some mistake. My wife is not a reverend and I'm not a doctor.

lines.speaker: Erica
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Agency guy
lines.text: That's impossible.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I could perform an operation on you and prove it if you'd like.

lines.speaker: Agency guy
lines.text: I'll go check your file. Excuse me.

lines.speaker: Erica
lines.text: So who are you?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well, our names really are Monica and Chandler. We're from New York.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yeah, but the important thing to know about us, is how much we would care for this little baby.

lines.speaker: Erica
lines.text: So you lied to me before?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Well, we... "bore false witness"... See I could be a reverend.
lines.stage_direction: makes quotation signs in the air

lines.speaker: Erica
lines.text: I can't believe this.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: But we were hoping that since we told you the truth that you still might consider...

lines.speaker: Erica
lines.text: Giving you my baby? You think I'd give you my child after this?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Well, you don't have to decide right now, but if you could just look at our file...

lines.speaker: Erica
lines.text: I don't want to look at your file! This is over.

scenes.scene_description: The Adoption Agency in Ohio. Monica and Chandler are entering.

scenes.location: The Adoption Agency in Ohio. Monica and Chandler are entering

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Erica wait!

lines.speaker: Erica
lines.text: I've nothing to say to you.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You have every reason to be upset. We did lie. But only because we've been waiting and trying to have a baby for so long. Now we don't know how long it's gonna be before we can get another chance again.

lines.speaker: Erica
lines.text: Why don't you ask the reverend to pray on it?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Erica, please. Just consider us. Ask them to see our file. Our last name's Bing. My wife's a chef and I'm in advertising.

lines.speaker: Erica
lines.text: Oh yeah. I actually liked you guys. But it doesn't matter, because what you did was wrong.
lines.stage_direction: walks away again, but Chandler catches up with her again

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: But you did like us. And you should. My wife's an incredible woman. She's loving and devoted and caring. And don't tell her I said this but the woman's always right... I love my wife more than anything in this world. And I... It kills me that I can't give her a baby... I really want a kid. And when that day finally comes, I'll learn how to be a good dad. But my wife... she's already there. She's a mother... without a baby... Please?

scenes.scene_description: She leaves the room, but Chandler runs after her. They meet in the hallway.

scenes.location: The Adoption Agency in Ohio. Monica and Chandler are entering

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You still want that baby?

scenes.scene_description: They look at each other. We switch back to Monica. Chandler opens the door and she turns to look at him.

scenes.location: The Adoption Agency in Ohio. Monica and Chandler are entering

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: God bless you Chandler Bing!

scenes.scene_description: Monica plays those words back in her mind and then smiles and runs to Chandler, who is twisting with joy. They hug.

scenes.location: Central Perk. Joey's on the couch when Ross walks to him

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Turns out this sweater is made for a woman.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: So, why are you still wearing it?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Because it's soft... Hey, so how was your date?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Ooh... Not so good.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well, looks like it's just the two of us tonight, huh old buddy?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah, and you know what? We could do a lot worse.

scenes.scene_description: Central Perk. Joey's on the couch when Ross walks to him, with his jacket closed.

scenes.location: Central Perk. Joey's on the couch when Ross walks to him

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: JOEY DOESN'T SHARE FOOD!

scenes.scene_description: they shake hands the way friends would. There's a muffin on the table, and Ross breaks off a piece and wants to put it in his mouth.

scenes.location: Central Perk. Joey's on the couch when Ross walks to him
scenes.scene_description: Ross puts the piece back on the plate

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Mmh... this cake is amazing ! Rachel : My God, get a room! Monica : I would get a room with this cake. I think I could show this cake a good time! Phoebe : If you had to, what would you give up, food or sex? Monica : Sex! Chandler : Seriously, answer faster! Monica : Oh, I'm sorry honey, you know, but when she said "sex" I wasn't thinking about "sex with you "! Chandler : It's like a giant hug. Phoebe : Ross, how about you. What would you give up, sex or food? Ross : Food. Phoebe : Ok, how about... uhm... sex or dinosaurs? Ross : Oh my God. It's like Sophie's Choice. Rachel : Oh God. What about you, Joe? What would you give up, sex or food? Joey : Uhm... oh... I don't know, it's too hard. Rachel : No, you gotta pick one! Joey : Oh... food. No, sex. Food! Sex! Food! Se-I don't know! Good God, I don't know, I want girls on bread!
lines.stage_direction: really excited with no hesitation looking at her to Phoebe

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: You gotta see these latest pictures of Emma. Phoebe : Oh, how cute! Rachel : Yeah. Phoebe : Oh, she looks just like a little doll! Rachel : Oh, no, no. That is a doll. Phoebe : Oh, thank God, 'cause that thing's really creepy! Look, there's Chandler. Rachel : Oh. Who is the blonde, she's pretty. Phoebe : OH! He's having an affair. Rachel : He's not having an affair! Phoebe : You know, I'm always right about these things. Rachel : No, you're not! Last week you thought Ross was trying to kill you! Phoebe : Well, I'm sorry but it's hard to believe that anyone would tell a story that dull just to tell it! See, there's something going on with them. Look, he's getting into the car with her! Rachel : Oh, that doesn't mean anything. Phoebe : Oh yeah? Well, let's see. Ok, duck down. Chandler : Hello. Phoebe : Oh, hi Chandler. It's Phoebe. Uhm... I know that Monica is working today so... ...I was wondering if you want to come to the movies with me and Rachel. Chandler : Oh, uhm... I have to work too. Yeah, I'm stuck at the office all day. Phoebe : Oh, well, it's a shame that you-that you miss the movie 'cause we were gonna see, you know, either "Liar, Liar" or "Betrayal", or... "An Affair To Remember". Chandler : Those are all really old! Phoebe : Ok, then maybe it'll be, uhm... Rachel : "Dude, Where's My Car?" Phoebe : What? Rachel : They're in a caaar... Phoebe : Okay, we-we'll talk to you later. Okay, bye. Rachel : Geez! Phoebe : Ok. Quick. We gotta find a cab and follow them. Rachel : Oh, yeah, ok. Let me just grab my night vision goggles and my stun gun. Phoebe : I got them!
lines.stage_direction: looking outside the window he's on the street, talking to a woman looking outside she takes her mobile phone they both get down to hide themselves. Phoebe calls Chandler picking up the phone back to Central Perk shocked whispering glancing at her to Chandler at the phone patting her bag

scenes.scene_description: Central Perk. Rachel and Phoebe are looking at some photos and they're sitting next to the window.

scenes.location: Monica’s apartment. Chandler enters the door

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hi! Monica : Hey! You smell like perfume and cigarettes. Chandler : I was in the car with Nancy all day. Monica : Nancy doesn’t smoke! Chandler : Well, at least the perfume is not mine, be thankful for that! Monica : So? What do you think of the house? Chandler : It’s perfect. It’s everything we’ve been looking for. Monica : Isn’t it? Then what about the amazing wainscotting and the crown molding and the dormer windows in the attic? Chandler : And the wiggle wharms and the zip zorps? What were the things you said? Monica : Don’t you love the huge yard? Chandler : And the fireplace in the bedroom. Monica : And Nancy said that it's really under price, because the guy lost his job and has to move in with his parents! Chandler : This is bringing out a lovely color in you! Monica : So? Do you think we should get it? Chandler : I don’t know. What do you think? Monica : I think we should. Chandler : I do too. Monica : This is huge! Chandler : I know. Monica : How bad you wanna smoke, right now. Chandler : I don’t know what you mean, giant talking cigarette! Oh, by the way, Phoebe called just as I was getting into Nancy’s car, so if she asks you, I was at work all day. Monica : Gotcha. When do we tell them about this? Chandler : We don’t. Not until it's a hundred percent. I mean, why upset everybody over nothing. Monica : Okay. Right. Oh my God that is gonna be so hard. Chandler : I know. Gooooood luck with it.

scenes.scene_description: Monica’s apartment. Chandler enters the door.

scenes.location: Joey’s apartment. Everybody except Monica and Chandler is there

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I just can’t see Chandler cheating! Rachel : I’m telling you guys, we followed them out to a house in Westchester, the went in for like forty-five minutes and then they came out looking pretty happy! Joey : Chandler? Forty-five minutes? Well, something is not right. I just can’t believe he would do this to Monica! Ross : I know, and with the baby coming? Phoebe : So, should we tell her? Ross : I don’t know. Phoebe, if one of us saw Mike with another woman would you want us to tell you? Phoebe : Why? Who’d you seen him with? Ross : No one, I’m just saying if... Phoebe : TELL ME WHAT YOU KNOW! Ross : I know nothing! Mike’s a great guy, it was hypothetical! Phoebe : All right. . He is a good guy. You’re right, he wouldn’t cheat. Ross : Believe me, if I did see with someone, there’s no way I... Phoebe : WHO DID YOU SEE HIM WITH?
lines.stage_direction: Phoebe starts pinching him in his neck yelling in pain she releases him Phoebe starts pinching him again

scenes.scene_description: Joey’s apartment. Everybody except Monica and Chandler is there.

scenes.location: Monica’s apartment. Monica is cleaning with a vacuum and then she cleans it with a dust buster. The guys enter the room

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, look at her, so happy! Monica : If only there were a smaller one to clean this one! Joey : Hey, is uhm... is Chandler here? Monica : No, he’s picking up dinner, why, what’s up? Phoebe : Well, look, whatever happens, we’re here for you and we love you. Monica : All right... Ross : We think Chandler might be having an affair. Monica : What? Rachel : Phoebe and I saw Chandler with a blonde woman today outside on the street and then we followed them to a house in Westchester. Phoebe : They went in together. So sorry. Monica : Oh my God! Oh my God that’s awful! What did you think of the house?

scenes.scene_description: Monica’s apartment. Monica is cleaning with a vacuum and then she cleans it with a dust buster. The guys enter the room.

scenes.location: We're back to the present. Chandler and Monica's. They're all still at the kitchen table

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: You can't move. You just... you just can't. Joey : Rachel's right. This is where you guys belong. Phoebe : Yeah, you don't wanna live in Westchester. That's like the worst of the Chesters. Ross : You know, sometimes when I'm alone in my apartment, I look over here and you guys... are just having dinner or... watching TV or something, but... it makes me feel better. And now when I look over, who am I gonna see? The Gottliebs, the Yangs? They don't make me feel so good. Rachel : Yeah. So don't move, okay? Just stay here and... maybe close your blinds at night.
lines.stage_direction: Joey pats Ross on his back nods towards Ross

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Rachel, this is yours. Rachel : Aah! Why? What are these for? Chandler : You'll see. Monica : All right, everybody open them!

lines.speaker: Monica

lines.speaker: Monica

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Ok.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Ok. Hold on. Geller here! No! I said it has to be there by 4 o'clock. Goodbye. Oh, how hard it is to make an ice sculpture?

lines.text: Please... honey, leave the details to me. Now I wanna make this day as special for you as I can. Now, ok, I was thinking that the harpist should wear white.

lines.text: Hey!

lines.text: Yeah, I thought we'd be groomsmen, but wouldn't they have asked us by now? When did they ask you to be their bridesmaid?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well, this is really awkward Oh, and I can leave!

lines.text: You are going downer!

lines.text: It's 2101 and I am not amused. . Ok, the bride and groom have a few words they'd like to say.

lines.text: Ok. Hello everyone and thank you all for being here tonight. So tomorrow's the big event and some of you might not know, but Mike and I didn't get off to the best start. . My friend Joey and I decided to fix each other up with friends so I, I... oh I... hum... I gave it a lot of thought and I fixed him up with my friend Mary Ellen who couldn't be here tonight because... it's not important... she is in rehab. Ok, I wanna take a moment to mention my mother, who couldn't be here...

lines.text: oh God.

lines.text: And... moment's over! So, ok, uh, I can forget that. I can forget that and uhm... Oh this is funny! Oh, but you need to know that to... that, to... Oh, ok, well, uhm, I . Ok, ok, I, ok, I.... MONICA I CAN'T DO IT LIKE THIS! THIS IS MY WEDDING! OKAY, I DON'T WANT THIS OR THIS OR THIS OK? I JUST WANTED A SIMPLE WEDDING! WHERE MY FIANCEE CAN GO TO THE BATHROOM ANYTIME HE WANTS! You know what? You're done.

lines.text: Hi

lines.text: Let me tell you why you need to pick me. See, when I was a kid, I was always left out of everything, you know, and it really made me feel... insecure. lines.text: No... It's lovely. The lights and the snow. I could look at them forever.

lines.text: I crushed a pill and put it in her drink... Come on, sweetheart.

lines.stage_direction: takes Chappy from Mike smells Chappy

lines.text: Level 1 alert. I repeat, level 1. This is not a drill. Okay we've got a situation. The minister just called. He's snowed in. He can't make it.

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: Oh, no!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh hey, don't worry. I'm still ordained from your wedding.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Really?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah, you'd think I'd give up being a minister and start paying to ride the subway? Huhuh...

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Uhm, ministers don't ride the subway for free.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I had to read the Bible pretty carefully, but... yeah we do.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Okay, if Joey does the ceremony, then we have to find someone else to walk Phoebe down the isle.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I'll do it.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I'll...

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Na ha ha... Ne he he... Ah ah...
lines.stage_direction: to Ross to Chappy Ross moves Chappy to Chandler, who quickly backs away

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Okay, Mike and Joey, get in position. Chandler, come with me.
lines.stage_direction: they walk off, Ross looks down to Chappy, who he's holding and he gets a whiff of the dog's smell. He is clearly disgusted by it.

scenes.scene_description: Outside. They are a bunch of people arranging chairs, shoveling snow and making other preparations.

scenes.location: Outside. They are a bunch of people arranging chairs

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Okay, Joey's doing the ceremony and Chandler's giving you away.

lines.text: Oh, okay. Hi new dad.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: So, you're ready to do this?

lines.text: Uhuh, uhuh... Oh my God! This is really happening.

lines.text: Oh Phoebe, I'm so happy for you honey.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh, thank you.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I love you. Oh, wait, wait, wait! No hugs. The dresses... Oh what the hell.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I love you guys.

lines.speaker: Rachel and Monica
lines.text: I love you.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Okay. It's zero hour. All teams execute on my count. Let's get this bad boy on the road.

lines.text: Is it okay that I want you to wear that head set in bed tonight?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I have you scheduled for nudity at 2300 hours.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh yeah!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Okay Marjorie, hit it.

lines.text: Geez Ross, you could have showered.

lines.text: It's the dog .

scenes.scene_description: A woman with a steel drum and a guy with a xylophone start playing an instrumental version of "Can't Help Falling In Love" by Elvis Presley. A bridesmaid and a groomsman walk down the isle. Next are Rachel and Ross, who carries Chappy in his arms.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Groomsman, groomsman, why are you just standing there, where is your bridesmaid? We've got a broken arrow. Bridesmaid down! Oh, that's me.

scenes.scene_description: we cut to Monica

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Ready?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh wait, oh no. Wait.

scenes.scene_description: She walks down the aisle with the groomsman. We cut to inside Central Perk, where Phoebe and Chandler are waiting.

lines.text: Wow! Aren't you gonna be cold?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I don't care... I'll be my something blue.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You look beautiful.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Thank you.

scenes.scene_description: She takes off the coat she was wearing over her wedding dress, which is violet and has a darker shade petticoat underneath which shows at one side where the dress is lifted up to about the height of her hip and connected to the petticoat. She's wearing a veil over her curly hair and a low cut top with straps only just hanging over her shoulders.

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: My God! Aren't you freezing?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Na-ah.

scenes.scene_description: They start to leave Central Perk. The band starts to play "Here, There and Everywhere" by the Beatles. The crowd rises from their seats. Phoebe and Chandler walk down the aisle. Phoebe really glows with happiness. So does Mike who watches her walk down the isle. When Phoebe and Chandler arrive, they kiss and Phoebe walks to her bridesmaids.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Friends, family, dog... Thank you all for being here to witness this blessed event. The cold has now spread to my special place... so I'm gonna do the short version of this. Phoebe and Mike are perfect for each other. And I know I speak for every one here... when I wish them a lifetime of happiness. Who has the rings?

scenes.scene_description: the music ends

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Okay...

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: When I was growing up, I didn't have a normal mom and dad, or a regular family like everybody else, and I always knew that something was missing. But now I'm standing here today, knowing that I have everything I'm ever gonna need... You are my family.
lines.stage_direction: She puts the ring on Mikes finger

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: Phoebe you're so beautiful. You're so kind, you're so generous. You're so wonderfully weird. Every day with you is an adventure, and I can't believe how lucky I am, and I can't wait to share my life with you forever.

lines.text: Oh wait, oh I forgot... and uhm... I love you... and you have nice eyes.

lines.text: Uh Joey...

lines.text: I do.

lines.text: I do.

Mike takes off his coat to give to Phoebe and the steel band plays "The Wedding Song"

lines.text: That really was an incredible wedding.

lines.stage_direction: enters the room wearing an "I love New York" t-shirt, a "Statue of Liberty" hat and carrying bags

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What is with you?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah, I've been to these places before, but I've never really seen them, you know.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yeah, you miss alot, when you're moo-ing.

lines.speaker: Erica
lines.text: Thanks so much for showing me around.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh! It was our pleasure. We are so much enjoying getting to know you.

lines.speaker: Erica
lines.text: Well, if there is anything else you wanna know...
lines.stage_direction: Monica and Chandler look at each other

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh, uhm, okay, uhm, do you mind if we ask you some questions about the father?

lines.speaker: Erica
lines.text: Oh, sure. Yeah, well, he was my high school boyfriend. Captain of the football team, really cute and he got a scholarship and went off to college.
lines.stage_direction: Monica and Chandler are smiling from ear to ear

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: That's great.

lines.speaker: Erica
lines.text: Yeah... it's almost definitely him.
lines.stage_direction: Monica and Chandler look confused now

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: How's that now?

lines.speaker: Erica
lines.text: Well, there is a chance it's another guy. I mean, I have only ever been with two guys, but they sorta overlapped.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: So, what does the other guy do? Does he go to college too?

lines.speaker: Erica
lines.text: No, he's in prison.
lines.stage_direction: More shocked looks from Monica and Chandler

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Was he falsely accused of something?

lines.speaker: Erica
lines.text: No... he killed his father with a shovel. But other than that, he's a great guy.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I'll bet his dad doesn't think so.

scenes.scene_description: Monica's apartment. Monica and Erica have just arrived.

scenes.location: Monica's apartment. Monica and Erica have just arrived

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Are you awake?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Of course I'm awake. Assume from now on that I'm always awake!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Alright, we don't know that it's him. I mean, it could be the football guy.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Honey, it's us . Of course it's the shovel-killer.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Alright, lets say that it is him, would we not want the baby? No! Would we treat him any differently?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I'd keep an eye on him! We have to find out which one the father is.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: How?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I dunno, aren't there tests for these things, right?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yeah, but maybe we're just over-reacting.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Pff, easy for you to say, he's a father killer. He probably loves him mommy. He's probably got a tattoo that says "mom" on his shovel-wielding arm!

scenes.scene_description: Time lapse. Chandler and Monica are in bed now

scenes.location: Joey's apartment. He is sitting on the barcalounger holding a French study book and listening to a French learning tape

lines.speaker: Tape
lines.text: We will now count from one to five. Un, deux, trois, quatre, cinq.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Huh, un, blu, bla, flu, flenk!

lines.speaker: Tape
lines.text: Good job.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Thank you.

scenes.scene_description: Joey's apartment. He is sitting on the barcalounger holding a French study book and listening to a French learning tape.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hey Joey.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Listen, I feel really badly about yesterday and I thought about it a lot and, and I know, I was too impatient. SO lets try it again.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh, no, that's okay, I don't need your help. I worked on it myself and I gotta say, I am pretty good!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Really, can I hear some of it.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Sure, sure. Ok, "Bleu de la bleu, de la blu bla bleu" See?
lines.stage_direction: clears his throat and starts to read from his script. He starts talking in a fake French accent, making gestures with his hands Phoebe looks astonished, annoyed and disgusted, Joey seems very proud though

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Well, you're not, You're not... you're not... again, you're not SPEAKING FRENCH!
lines.stage_direction: she tries to smile and contain her anger, but loses it

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh well I think I am, yeah and I think I'm definitely gonna get the part.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: How could you possibly think that?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: For one thing, the guy on the tape said I was doing a good job!

scenes.scene_description: Phoebe enters

scenes.location: The hospital. Rachel is pouring her self a cup of coffee. Ross approaches from behind

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey Rach, can you grab me a cup of coffee?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Sure.
lines.stage_direction: She turns around very slowly, looks at him for a second and then turns back to her coffee She gives him the cup she was pouring for herself without looking at him

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: You've been quiet all morning. Is everything okay?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hmm-hmm.
lines.stage_direction: starts to pour herself a cup of coffee, never looking at Ross

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: You sure you're alright?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yep.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: O-kay. Well, I'm gonna go grab us some breakfast.
lines.stage_direction: knowing she's not alright He starts to leave

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: FYI..

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: There it is...
lines.stage_direction: knew this was coming he comes back

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: In the future, when a girl asks for some ill-advised sympathy sex... just do it.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Wait, wait, You're mad at me about last night? I was just trying to do the right thing.
lines.stage_direction: half amused looks around a little

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Really? Well, it seems to me if you'd done the right thing, I would not have woken up today feeling stupid and embarrassed, I would have woken up feeling comforted and satisfied !

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well...
lines.stage_direction: acknowledging the last part of her sentence

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh stop that!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I can't believe this. I was just being a good guy. I treated you with respect and understanding.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, that is so hot. She walks around him to the other side)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey, I was looking out for you.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, really, well Ross, you know what? I am a big girl. I don't need someone telling me what is best for me.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I gotta say, I have not had sex a lot of times before, this is the worst ever .

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, really, really? Well, it wasn't very good for me either.
lines.stage_direction: She turns to leave and Ross over takes her and stands infront on her, his back to the row of doors leading to the hospital rooms

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey you know what? You know what? To avoid this little thing in the future, let's just say, you and me, never having sex again.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: That's right, sex is off the table. I am never having sex with you again. Dr. Green, are you feeling better?
lines.stage_direction: The door starts to open behind him and Dr. Green emerges Rachel stays quiet and after a few moments Ross realizes what has happened. He turns abruptly Rachel's dad glares at him with a deadly look

scenes.scene_description: The hospital. Rachel is pouring her self a cup of coffee. Ross approaches from behind.

scenes.location: Monica and Chandler's apartment. Monica and Erica enter

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey! How was lunch?

lines.speaker: Erica
lines.text: We had a good time. By the way, I wanted to ask you something. It would really mean a lot to me, if the baby was a boy, that you name him after my father, Jiminy Billy Bob
lines.stage_direction: To Chandler Monica smiles at Chandler and his he looks shocked and scared, getting no support from his wife

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh, really?

lines.speaker: Erica
lines.text: No! You we're right, that was fun! I'm gonna go finish packing.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: O-okay. So, is she gonna take the test?
lines.stage_direction: steps closer to Monica and speaks softly

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Nope, she doesn't have to, I found out who the father is.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh God. It's shovely-Joe, isn't it?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: No it's not.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: How do you know?

lines.speaker: Erica
lines.text: Well, it turns out that Erica didn't pay much attention in Sex Ed class, because the thing she did with that prison guy... it'd be pretty hard to make a baby that way.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh God! What was it? The thing that we hardly ever do or the thing we never do?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: The thing we never do.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Shovely Joe!

scenes.scene_description: Monica and Chandler's apartment. Monica and Erica enter, Chandler is in the kitchen.

scenes.location: The theatre where Joey is auditioning. Phoebe enters when Joey's on stage and she sits down. He hasn't seen her

lines.speaker: Director
lines.text: Whenever you're ready Joey.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Right. Dja bu bu Claude. Uh, c'est la pu les la lu blah bloo.

lines.speaker: Casting assistant
lines.text: I'm sorry, what's going on?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Dude, come on! French it u-up!

lines.speaker: Director
lines.text: Joey, do you speak French?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Toutes la smore! Bu blu-ay bloo blah ooh! Pfoof!

lines.speaker: Director
lines.text: You know what. I think this audition is over.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Uh, excuse me. Uh, I am Reginé Philange. I was passing by when I heard this man speaking the regional dialect of my French town of Estée Lauder.

lines.speaker: Director
lines.text: You really think this man is speaking French?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Sa-sa-saw!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Écoutez, je vais vous dire la vérité. C'est mon petit frère. Il est un peu retardé.
lines.stage_direction: Translation: Listen, I will tell you the truth. He's my little bother. He's a bit retarded.

scenes.scene_description: The theatre where Joey is auditioning. Phoebe enters when Joey's on stage and she sits down. He hasn't seen her.

scenes.location: The theatre where Joey is auditioning. Phoebe enters when Joey's on stage and she sits down. He hasn't seen her

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Alors, si vous pouviez jouer le jeu avec lui...
lines.stage_direction: Translation: So, would you please just humor him?

lines.speaker: Director
lines.text: Good job, little buddy. That was some really good French. But I think we're gonna go with someone else for the part.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Ah. All right. But my French was good?

lines.speaker: Director
lines.text: It was great.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh-hoh! Ha-hah! See!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Merci. Au revoir.
lines.stage_direction: to the director Translation: Thanks, goodbye.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah-hah. Toute-de-le-fruit.

scenes.scene_description: The director looks at Joey and he nods.

scenes.location: Joey and Rachel's apartment. Rachel is sitting at the kitchen counter and Ross enters from Rachel and Emma's room

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Emma's down for the night.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, good.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: So uh... I guess I wanna take off.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay... Hey listen, just before you go I-I again, I just wanna say "thank you" for coming with me.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh, no problem.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: And also, you know I uh, I was thinking about what you said, you know, about the whole sex thing and... it's probably not a great idea to go down that road again.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Thank you. I'm glad you agree.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: It's a shame though, I mean, when we did it, it was pretty good.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah... Yeah, that's true.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hey uhm, do you remember that one really great time...?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh, ye-ah!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: You know it was you're uhm... birthday...

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: ...Valentine's day...

lines.speaker: Both
lines.text: Oh yeah!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well, I guess that's all in the past, now.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hmmm-mmmm.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Not even one more time?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Not even once.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: No matter how much we want it.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Even if we want it really bad .

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: That's what we decided.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Uhm, right!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: ...It's kinda hard though!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: You know, when two people have a connection, you know, that's... just seems like such a... waste.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: ...I hate waste.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: ...Ross?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yes?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Just so you know... With us... it's never off the table.
lines.stage_direction: she enters her room and closes the door.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Damn it. It's never off the table.

scenes.scene_description: Joey and Rachel's apartment. Rachel is sitting at the kitchen counter and Ross enters from Rachel and Emma's room.

scenes.location: Joey and Rachel's apartment. Phoebe and Joey are "updating" Joey's resumé

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Okay, can you really tapdance?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: It's off the resumé.
lines.stage_direction: she strikes it through with a pencil

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Archery?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Horseback riding?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Would fall off a lot.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: You can drink a gallon of milk in 10 seconds?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: That I can do.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Come on! You can drink a gallon of milk in 10 seconds?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: All right, watch me! Okay, you time me. Ready?
lines.stage_direction: he takes a full container of milk from the fridge

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Ready... GO!

scenes.scene_description: Joey and Rachel's apartment. Phoebe and Joey are "updating" Joey's resumé.

scenes.location: Joey and Rachel's apartment. Phoebe and Joey are "updating" Joey's resumé

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: You did it!

scenes.scene_description: Joey takes the plastic container to his mouth and starts to drink. Most of the milk gushes from the bottle down his chin and over his clothes to the floor. He keeps "drinking" and all of a sudden he lifts it up and half the bottle of milk pours out in an instant. He then continues to drink the rest. He then puts the empty container down on the counter.

title: Friends - 10.14 - The One With Princess Consuela

lines.speaker: Produced by
lines.text: Robert Carlock & Wendy Knoller

scenes.location: Chandler and Monica's apartment. They are having a diner party with Phoebe and Mike

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: Thank you guys for having us over. Phoebe : Oh! Yeah, this is fun, couples night. Chandler : Yeah, I don't know why we hang out with married couples more often. Monica : Well, because every time we do, you make jokes about swinging and scare them away. Chandler : You mean that Portuguese couple? Yeah, like you wouldn't have done it. Ross : Hey, you guys... I have great news. Monica : Ross, we're kind of in the middle of diner here. Ross : Oh, well, er, I already ate, but sure...! Guess what happened at work today... Chandler : A dinosaur died a million years ago? Ross : Try sixty-five million years ago, and then try sssshhhhhh.... My tenure review board met today and I hear it's looking really good. Phoebe : Wow! Ross : Yeah. Do you have any idea what this means in academic circles, uh? I am gonna get laid . Rachel : Hi you guys. All : Hey. Rachel : Ooh, Italian! Monica : No one wanted seconds, right? Ross : No, no. I-I'm good. Rachel : Hey you guys... You're never gonna believe it. This headhunter called me. I have a meeting tomorrow with Gucci. Gucci wants me . Ross : I'm up for tenure. Rachel : Congratulations! Ross : You too! What are the odds? Rachel : Ooh! Joey : Guess what? I finally got that seed out of my teeth. Monica : I don't know who I'm happiest for... Phoebe : I do , he's been working on that all day!
lines.stage_direction: raising his glass she shrugs entering they all look at each other when Ross grabs a plate while entering she also grabs a plate they hug enters they all look expectantly at him looking at Joey

scenes.scene_description: Chandler and Monica's apartment. They are having a diner party with Phoebe and Mike.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hey Mon? Was it weird changing your name to Geller-Bing? Monica : No, no. It felt nice to acknowledge this. Phoebe : Where did you go to do it? Monica : Uhm the... the ministry... of names... bureau... Chandler : YOU NEVER DID IT! Monica : I'm sorry. It's just the idea of being an official Bing. Chandler : Hey! I will have you know that... aah, who am I kidding. Let's call the kid Geller and let Bing die with me. Mike : Here you go. Phoebe : Thanks! Honey, would you want me to take your name? Mike : Oh, it's just... It's up to you. It's your name. You've got to live with it. Phoebe : All right, let's see, call me mrs Hannigan. Chandler : Mrs Hannigan? Phoebe : What? Can't you see I'm in the middle of something? Ooh, I like it. Joey : Hey guys. Chandler : Hey Joe! We've got a couple of things we've got to check out at the new house. You want to come with us? Joey : No, thank you. Monica : All right. I know you're not happy about us moving, but you're the only one who hasn't seen the house. Chandler : Yeah, come with us. You'll see how close it is to the city. Joey : But no, it's not close. You said it was in escrow? I couldn't even find it on the map. Monica : Joey, please come. It would mean so much to us. Joey : You know what? You are my friends, I wanna be supportive, I will come with you. SHOTGUN! Chandler : Damn it. Monica : See you guys later. Phoebe : Okay! Monica : I'll pick you up at eleven. So glad you're coming. Phoebe : Good for you. That was really mature. Joey : What? No, the only reason I'm going to their stupid new house, is so I can point out everything that's wrong with it, so they don't move. I'm gonna make them stay here. Mike : You're a strange kind of grown-up. Phoebe : Joey, you can't make someone do something they don't want to do. Believe me, there's something I've been trying to get Mike to do in bed and there's... he's just... Mike : Woo-wo-hey-hey-hey... Can we not talk about that right now? Phoebe : All right, prude ... Look, Monica and Chandler really love this house. You are not gonna talk them into staying here. Joey : Hey, hey... I can convince people to do anything, you know. I bet I can even get Mike to do that "thing". What is it?
lines.stage_direction: pats Chandler on his leg walks to the couch with coffee for Phoebe enters to Joey

scenes.scene_description: Central Perk. Phoebe, Monica and Chandler on their couch.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hi, I'm here to see mr Campbell... with Gucci. The reservation is probably under Gucci. It's spelled like Gu kk i, which could be confusing. Maitre d' : Mr Campbell's not here yet. Let me show you to his table.

scenes.scene_description: A restaurant. Rachel enters.
Rachel holds her hand in order to support her head. Mr Zellner obviously overheard the conversation.

scenes.location: A counter at a government building. Phoebe's waiting in line

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: This place is so depressing. If I had to work here I'd kill myself. But you obviously haven't. Clerk : How can I help you? Phoebe : I need to change my name, please. See, I need to change it because I'm-I'm hiding from the law. You're fun. Clerk : You need to fill out this form. Phoebe : Okay, well, I just don't, I don't know how it works exactly. See, my name is Buffay and my husband's name is Hannigan, so is it supposed to be Buffay-Hannigan or Hannigan-Buffay? Clerk : It can be anything you want. Phoebe : Well, not anything , I mean... Clerk : Yeah... anything . Phoebe : Oh, this could take a while. Clerk : Get out of my line. Phoebe : Okay.
lines.stage_direction: to the woman behind her she turns around and the clerk behind the counter heard her. the clerk shows no change in expression whatsoever motions for the next person in line

scenes.scene_description: A counter at a government building. Phoebe's waiting in line.

scenes.location: Central Perk. Chandler and Monica are there when Phoebe enters

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hey! Monica : Hey Pheebs. Phoebe : Oh, not anymore. I changed it today. Monica : Oh, I'm sorry, mrs Hannigan. Phoebe : Wrong again! Apparently you can change it to anything you want. So I thought, all right, here's an opportunity to be creative. So meet Princess Consuela Banana Hammock. Chandler : That's what we were gonna name the baby. Monica : Phoebe! Phoebe : Uh! Princess Consuela. Monica : You seriously changed your name to that? Phoebe : Uh-huh! Monica : Okay, so from now on we have to call you Princess Consuela? Phoebe : Uhm, no. I'm gonna have my friends call me Valerie.

scenes.scene_description: Central Perk. Chandler and Monica are there when Phoebe enters.

scenes.location: Chandler and Monica's future house. They enter the living room with the realtor and Joey

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Thank you for letting us see the house again. Chandler : And thank you for explaining to us what escrow means... I've already forgotten what you said, but thank you. Realtor : Take as long as you want. Just let me know when you're through. Monica : Ah, so glad you decided to come. Joey : Me too. Yeah, this place is great. I'm so happy for you guys. Although, you know, I hope you like fungus. Chandler : What? Joey : Fungus! Yeah. Place is full of it. Monica : No it's not. We had an inspection and they didn't find anything. Joey : Okay. Then I guess I have dry eyes and a scratchy throat for no reason. Monica : Maybe because it's you hung your head out of the window like a dog the whole ride here. Joey : Maybe. So this is the living room huh? Ooh, it's pretty dark. Monica : No it's not! Joey : Are you kiddin'? I think I just saw a bat in the corner! Chandler : When your head was hanging out the window, it didn't hit a mailbox, did it? Joey : Maybe. Well, I just think you guys can do better than this house, you know? Or any other house for that matter. Monica : Oh Joey, look, we know you're having a hard time with this, but we really, we love it here. Joey : FINE, ok, if you love this house so much, then you should just live here, okay? I just hope you get used to that weird humming sound. Hmmmmmmmmmmmmmm... Monica : Joey, we know that's you. Joey : no... hmmmmm... it's not... hmmmmmmmmmm
lines.stage_direction: she leaves the room starts feeling around him like he's in a completely dark room, touching Chandler, who backs out and hits him squinting his eyes glares at him for a moment, then admits grudgingly He turns his back to them and starts humming

scenes.scene_description: Chandler and Monica's future house. They enter the living room with the realtor and Joey.

scenes.location: Phoebe is at Central Perk. Mike enters

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: Hey Phoebe : Welcome back! Mike : Ah! I missed you Phoebe : Oh, me too! Mike : So, what's new? Phoebe : Well, I'm no longer Phoebe Buffay. Mike : That's great! You changed you name? Phoebe : Yes I did! Meet: Princess Consuela Banana Hammock! Mike : You're kidding right? Phoebe : Nope. Mike : You really did that? Phoebe : Yep. Mike : Yeah, but you can't do that. Phoebe : Why? It's fun, it's different, no-one else has a name like it. Mike : Alright, then I'm gonna change my name. Phoebe : Great, okay, what are you gonna change it to? Mike : Crap Bag. Phoebe : Mike Crap Bag? Mike : No, no Mike, just Crap Bag. First name Crap, last name Bag. Phoebe : You're not serious, right? Mike : Yeah, I'm serious. It's fun, it's different and no-one else has a name like that! Phoebe : Uhu, uhu, well, then, great . If you love it, I love it. Mike : I do love it, and I love your name. I love Princess Consuela. Phoebe : And I love Crap.
lines.stage_direction: He kisses Phoebe She smiles from ear to ear afraid looks at her astonished not amused sarcastic

scenes.scene_description: Phoebe is at Central Perk. Mike enters.

lines.text: Ow!

scenes.location: Outside Ralph Lauren building. Rachel just walked out carrying a box of her stuff

lines.speaker: Man
lines.text: Hey Rach, I just heard. I'm so sorry. Rachel : Oh, thank you... Man : You still don't know my name, do you? Rachel : Well, now I don't have to.
lines.stage_direction: looks at his face trying to remember his name Is embarrassed for a moment, but it quickly passes The man leaves instantly

scenes.location: Chandler and Monica's new house. Sitting near the window

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh, I love this street. The trees, the big front yards, the actual picket fences. Chandler : Man, those two dogs are going at it ! Joey : Hey! Chandler : Hey. Monica : Hey, where have you been? Joey : Oh, just er... you know, looking around. But you know what? This house... is great. Chandler : Really? What changed your mind? Joey : Oh well, the little girl who lives here made me feel a lot better about the whole thing. Chandler : Joey, there was a little girl who lived here, but she died like 30 years ago.

scenes.scene_description: Chandler and Monica's new house. Sitting near the window, they look at the neighborhood.
